programme.desc: The Good Son : Director Vance’s brother-in-law is the lead suspect when Gibbs and the NCIS team investigate the murder of a petty officer.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The Missionary Position : Following the murder of a Marine, Tony and Ziva join Ziva’s longtime friend and mentor in Columbia in a search for a missing Marine Lieutenant and Navy Chaplain. Meanwhile, Jimmy Palmer decides who will be his best man.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Rekindled : After a warehouse fire reveals missing Navy documents, posing a potential threat to national security, the NCIS team joins the Baltimore P.D. investigation, reuniting Tony with a boy from his past.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Playing With Fire : The NCIS investigation of a fire on a Navy vessel reveals evidence that elevates security at all US Navy facilities worldwide. Meanwhile, DiNozzo and Ziva travel to Italy when an explosive device is found hidden on a Navy ship.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Up in Smoke : The NCIS team analyses what secrets could be in the hands of a terrorist targeting the Navy when a high-tech bug is found inside a probationary agent's tooth.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Til Death Do Us Part : Terrorism shakes the foundations of the Navy and NCIS to such an extent that Gibbs and the team face surprises that will devastate them.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Yankee White : While on Air Force One, a Navy Commander dies. Agents from NCIS decide to take the investigation into their own hands and also force Secret Service Agent Kate Todd to help.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Hung Out to Dry : Gibbs and his agents investigate a Marine who died when his parachute failed to open during a training exercise, and Gibbs turns to Lt Roberts to get the necessary search warrants to prove his theory.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Seadog (aka Dirty Little Secret) : When a Navy commander's body washes up on shore along with the bodies of two drug runners, Gibbs refuses to believe that the sailor who was killed was dirty.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The Immortals : The team are dispatched to a destroyer to probe the bizarre death of a sailor, discovering he was deeply immersed in an addictive fantasy role-playing game and may have been bent on exacting revenge on his arch rival.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The Curse : The mummified body of a Navy lieutenant who went missing nearly ten years ago is found by a deer hunter. The NCIS team must find out what happened to him - and where the $1 million that he had on his ship went.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: High Seas : An NCIS agent who used to work under Gibbs asks for the team's help investigating a case where sailors on an aircraft carrier are dying of a drug overdose, but have no history of any kind of drug abuse.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sub Rosa : A decomposed body is found in a tub of acid at a naval base, leading Gibbs to deduce that an imposter is serving on board one of the nuclear submarines.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Minimum Security : The NCIS team head to Cuba to investigate a Navy translator's connection to smuggling at a detention center after he suddenly dies at the wheel of his car when returning to the U.S. from Guantanamo Bay.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Marine Down : After a marine widow receives a call from her dead husband, the NCIS team takes on the case and has to exhume the body to deduce whether the call was a prank or not.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Left For Dead : Twin Peaks actress Sherilyn Fenn guest stars in a gripping if claustrophic case involving an amnesia victim who was buried alive - but is she all she seems?.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Katherine Heigl, Cooking with Chef Lara lee, Hollywood Hair Stylist Jen Atkin, Terrence Terrell : “Firefly Lane” star Katherine Heigl chats. Chef Lara Lee teaches how to make Indonesian Fried Rice. Hair stylist Jen Atkin surprises some Drew-Gooder hairstylists. Plus, “B Positive” star Terrence Terrell joins Drew and Ross at the Drew’s News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Oliver Hudson, Ashlee Simpson & Evan Ross, Cooking with Jeremy Ford : Oliver Hudson stops by to chat. “The United States vs. Billie Holiday” star Evan Ross and his wife musician Ashlee Simpson join Drew and answer relationship questions. “Fast Foodies” host Jeremy Ford recreates one of Drew’s favorite fast food dishes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kristen Bell, Jenna Lyons, Flour Shop’s Amirah Kassem, The Weekender : Kristen Bell chats about her new children’s book. Jenna Lyons shares tips with a small business owner. Drew wraps up cake week with Amirah Kassem who bakes up one of her most popular cakes. Drew gives a list of her favorite picks in “The Weekender.”

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Josh Lucas, Ali Wentworth, Meatless Meatballs with Molly Yeh, Drew-Gooder : Josh Lucas stops by. Ali Wentworth joins Drew and Ross in Drew’s News. Molly Yeh whips up her meatless meatballs. Meet Sherina Jones whose organization Village Free-dge stocks up refrigerators located around Miami with free food for those struggling.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Meagan Good, Battle of the Bites: Clam Chowder, Gary Vaynerchuk : "If Not Now, When?" producer, director and co-star Meagan Good stops by to chat. Then, in "Battle of the Bites: Clam Chowder Edition" Drew taste tests clam chowders from Boston and declares a winner! Plus, entrepreneur Gary Vaynerchuk joins Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Halloween Celebration with Adam Sandler, Pumpkin Blaze, Jill Kargman : Drew kicks-off her week-long Halloween celebration with Netflix’s “Hubie Halloween” star Adam Sandler. Then, actress Jill Kargman and Drew visit Pumpkin Blaze Long Island! Plus, Drew tackles dating at any age in her signature “Love Bug” segment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Priyanka Chopra Jonas, Cooking with Giada DeLaurentiis, Drew’s News : “Unfinished: A Memoir” author Priyanka Chopra Jonas chats. “Bobby and Giada in Italy” star Giada DeLaurentiis whips up Cacio E Pepe with Pancetta and Arugula and helps Drew surprise a Drew-Gooder. Drew and Ross team up in Drew’s News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Small Business Challenge, Edgar Ramirez, Wildflower Chef, Cleo Wade : Drew is joined by Kendra Scott for her first Small Business Challenge. Edgar Ramirez chats. Drew spotlights Chopped Champion Chef Roshara Sanders who teaches Drew how to make a jerk crab cake sandwich. Cleo Wade chats about her first children’s book.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Annaleigh Ashford, Olympic Snowboarder Jamie Anderson : Actress Annaleigh Ashford chats. Drew has a big surprise for nurse Gina Goodwin, who cooks and delivers hundreds of meals every Thanksgiving. Olympic snowboarder Jamie Anderson shares her winter skin routine. Drew reads letters in "Dear Drew."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Michael Strahan, Cookbook Club with Jamie Oliver : "Good Morning America's" Michael Strahan joins Drew and tasks her with an extra messy stain challenge. Jamie Oliver whips up shrimp linguine and discusses his new book. Soccer player Leslie Osborne on creating a beauty line that outlasts your workout.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ellie Kemper, Drew Gooder, Ricardo Chavira : "The Stand-In" actress Ellie Kemper joins Drew to chat about their new film. Meet Kenya Congress, The Funnel Cake Queen, who uses the money from her funnel cake business to help customers. Plus, "Selena: The Series" star Ricardo Chavira.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis, Chris Appleton, Drew Gooder: Good Deeds Store Follow Up : Giada De Laurentiis joins Drew for Cookbook Club and whips up Salmon Puttanesca. Drew revisits with the Principal whose school started a grocery store that only accepts good deeds as a form of payment. Chris Appleton shares his top hair styling tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Stanley Tucci, "Hubie Halloween" Noah Schnapp : Drew continues the week-long Halloween celebration with "The Witches" star Stanley Tucci. Leo Kelly joins to make a mocktail. "Hubie Halloween" star Noah Schnapp stops by to chat. Plus, Design by Drew Scarrymore and the Drew Scarrymore Costume Challenge.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon, Cooking with Action Bronson, My Fairy Godfathers : Kevin Bacon joins Drew. Rapper and chef Action Bronson discusses his weight loss and whips up Backyard Markham Street Style Lamb Burgers. Meet the founders of My Fairy Godfathers, a non-profit dedicated to helping women in need by providing makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Wildflower: Model Winnie Harlow, Mom’s Time Out : Drew spotlights women in signature "Wildflower." Laura Sobiech and Director Justin Baldoni discuss her son Zach’s battle with cancer inspiring a number one song. In "Mom’s Time Out," Drew surprises one deserving mom with an all-expenses paid vacation!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Beauty Week Kick-Off with Supermodel Iman, Max Greenfield, America’s Youngest Beauty Store Owner : Drew kicks off Beauty Week with Supermodel and founder of IMAN Cosmetics Iman. In "Drew & A," Drew and Iman help solve audience members beauty dilemmas. Max Greenfield stops by. Then, meet America’s youngest beauty supply store owner Paris McKenzie.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Hoda Kotb, America’s Most Haunted House, The Weekender : "Today" Co-Anchor Hoda Kotb joins Drew to discuss her new book. Drew goes inside one of America’s most Haunted Houses with the help of a medium. Then, Drew gives a curated list of her favorites in "The Weekender."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Laura Prepon, Cooking with Babs, Abbi Jacobson : Actress Laura Prepon shares her new kitchen gadget line. The grandmother behind TikTok's Brunch with Babs, Barbara Costello, joins Drew and Laura in the kitchen to whip up a dish. Netflix’s “The Mitchells vs. The Machines” star Abbi Jacobson joins Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chris O’Donnell, Cooking with Geoffrey Zakarian, Dr. Aliza Pressman : "NCIS: Los Angeles" star Chris O’Donnell stops by to chat. Drew’s whipping up a cozy fall soup with accomplished chef Geoffrey Zakarian. Plus, psychologist Dr. Aliza Pressman joins Drew to help solve viewers dilemmas.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Payback : Car thieves are plaguing the city - they steal a specially adapted van used by a disabled boy. Walker is determined to find it for him. In the process of looking for it, Walker kills one of the thieves - a young boy whom Walker knows.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Tiger's Eye : The daughter of a wealthy Texas businessman is kidnapped by a Japanese gang. The ransom request is for the businessman to turn over his security chief who had been a cop in Japan and was responsible for capturing many of the gang members.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Big Bingo Bamboozle : The leaders of a money-laundering operation at a bingo hall are captured and put on trial. The accountant is asked to testify against her bosses. Walker and Trivette have to take her to court, but she keeps escaping them for her own agenda.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Mustangs : A man contacts Alex about a problem but is killed before giving details. His last words are to save the horses. The rangers investigate the man's last days and find a plot to kill the wild mustangs on a range to make way for a development.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part : After a woman's car is forced off the road by a hit-and-run, Walker makes a daring rescue of her and her daughter. He is injured and falls into a coma in the hospital. Trivette and others search for the driver of the hit-and-run car.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rainbow Warrior : An elderly Indian Chief dies. He learns that Chief Six Feathers was killed because he would not sign over his land for development. The chief's relative gets into trouble investigating the death. Walker and Trivette help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Road to Black Bayou: Part 1 : Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Road to Black Bayou: Part 2 : Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Line of Fire : A policeman learns a few other policemen are stealing drugs from the evidence room in order to sell them. He is killed to keep him from telling Alex and Walker. The rangers investigate his death to find the dirty cops.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Payback : Car thieves are plaguing the city - they steal a specially adapted van used by a disabled boy. Walker is determined to find it for him. In the process of looking for it, Walker kills one of the thieves - a young boy whom Walker knows.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Money Train : Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Mean Streets : The homeless are being beaten by a group of teens who film their attack. Walker poses as a homeless man to see if he can catch them in the act.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Cowboy : A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: War Zone: Part 1 : Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: War Zone: Part 2 : Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Trust No One : The rangers attempt to capture counterfeiters. They escape, but the rangers take the fake money into evidence. When $5 million is missing, Trivette is accused. Walker must clear Trivette's name and find the real criminals.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Blue Movies : When a judge is murdered, Walker captures the hit-man and finds out that D.L. Dade ordered the hit. Since Alex has no evidence against Dade for murder, Walker gathers evidence for Dade to get him in jail.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: On Sacred Ground : Walker returns to the Indian Reservation when some Cherokees are accused of stealing pieces from an art gallery, claiming the pieces are really artifacts from a Native American region.

programme.desc: I Confess... I Cheated and Paid for Sex Seven Times! : On today's MAURY… It's jilted lovers at their wit's end and accused cheaters put to the test. These women are desperate to know if their men are cheating on them. But these men say they're just being jealous and overprotective. Tune in today!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Does Derrick Have 26 Kids... The DNA Results Are In! : On today's MAURY… these women are turning to MAURY for something more than excuses. They need RESULTS! After the truth is revealed, will these fathers finally face the music, or will these moms have to continue their searches?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: You're Cheating on My Son... He's Not Your Baby's Dad! : Kiki and her sister Sad-e swear that Kiki's boyfriend Tavon is cheating on her. programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and The Loving Cup : Ricky insults Lucy's taste in hats so, as a joke, Lucy puts a loving cap trophy on her head that Ricky plans to present to champion jockey Johnny Longden at a National Turf Association dinner later that night. The trophy gets stuck on Lucy's head.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Superman : Little Ricky is turning 5 years old and Lucy had a party planned for Saturday, but Caroline Appleby is throwing a birthday party for her son Stevie on the same day. Neither mother is willing to change the date of their party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky Gets A Dog : Lucy and Ricky are determined to get rid of the puppy their son has brought home. They have a hard time overcoming Little Ricky’s arguments that it’s a welcome addition to a home that already boasts a parakeet, a frog, a lizard, a turtle and a goldfish.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Séance : Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Men Are Messy : When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fur Coat : Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Is Jealous of Girl Singer : Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Drafted : Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Adagio : Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Benefit : Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Amateur Hour : Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Plays Cupid : Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Fakes Illness : In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Writes A Play : Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Breaking The Lease : The Mertzes enjoy an evening singing around the piano with the Ricardos in their apartment. When they retire for the night and Lucy and Ricky continue singing, Ethel phones them demanding quiet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Thinks Ricky Is Trying To Murder Her : Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Girls Want to Go to A Nightclub : To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Be A Pal : Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Diet : One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Quiz Show : When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Audition Show : Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Séance : Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Men Are Messy : When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fur Coat : Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Is Jealous of Girl Singer : Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Drafted : Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Adagio : Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Benefit : Ethel wants Ricky to headline a benefit for her women's club. Lucy will only try to arrange it if she is on the bill as well. After hearing Lucy's terrible singing voice, Ethel is less than eager, but eventually agrees.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Amateur Hour : Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Plays Cupid : Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Buddies : A deathbed letter from an old friend puts the life of Ben Matlock in peril when he feels morally obligated to reopen a murder case more than three decades old.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The New Cybertron City : Tidal Wave sees Megatron's sword.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Megatron Resurrected : Super Optimus Prime emerges to find his team searching for energon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Megatron's Raid : Megatron is alive again and forces Scorponok to serve him, but Scorponok is loyal to only one master Alpha Q.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Jungle Planet : Shockblast has been captured and temporarily imprisoned on Iron Planet. Inferno is left to stand guard over Shockblast while the other Autobots are on Jungle Planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Bulkhead : Team Bulkhead searches for the Autobots, while Kicker and Ironhide search for Inferno on the Jungle Planet. Inferno, who was previously affected by the Decepticons into embracing the dark side, is saved by Kicker after learning of a Decepticon attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Farewell Inferno : The Autobots go to put up an Energon tower on Jungle planet but Megatron isn't going to let that happen without a fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Crash Course : Inferno uses his decepticon "half" to bait Megatron. In the end, Inferno sacrifices himself in the sun to defeat the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Omega Supreme : The Autobots have spare time so Rodimus authorizes a race for the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: A Heroic Battle : Omega Supreme first appearance. Autobots finally find Unicron. Inferno is repaired into Roadblock.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Power of Unicron : Unicron gets his head back. Alpha Q dies in the process.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Optimus Supreme : The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor. Meanwhile, some very interesting transformations are taking place on the Decepticon team…

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Unicron Perishes : The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron. All autobots can't save it and almost all of them got wounded from Unicron's attack.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ambition : Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Wishes : The Decepticons, Megatron, Starscream, and Scorponok attack Cybertron. Optimus Prime and the other Autobots, aboard the Miranda II, travelled to Cybertron to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron : Using Unicron, Megatron has discovered a powerful source of energy: Super Energon. By immersing himself in the liquid, he is transformed into Galvatron, with a new purple armor which makes him impervious to all forms of firepower.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Breakthrough : Galvatron has Sixshot start moving Cybertron towards the planet where Alpha Q's "soul" is. The Miranda II gets hit and crashes into Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Distribution : Optimus Prime and the other Autobots try to breakthrough the energon grid and then later have to go under ground

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Omega Train : The Autobots battle, but this time in cyberspace, a virtual training program. While Alpha Q watches from the sidelines, Six Shot hacks into the program and enables the Decepticons to play in the game.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Decepticon Army : The Autobots split up and with the help of other autobot rebels they attempt to find and free Kickers family and Cybertron. Galvatron gets Cybertron through the space bridge.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Ironhide Team : Kicker searches for his family below Cybertron, while Galvatron and a damaged Optimus square off on the planet's surface. Kicker is reunite with his mother and sister.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Formidable : Kicker's dad sabotages the energon gas grid from within enabling Optimus to get into the Command Center and Rodimus and Prowl waiting around Cybertron to get to the planet. The terrorcons got into the super energon and grow in size.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Galvatron Terror : Primus is still snoozing, Sixshot overloads the grid and causes a huge explosion that takes down most of the autobots, and Cybertron heads for Plains planet and destroys all the planets in its path.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Destructive Power : Sixshot convinces Mirage, Snow Cat, and Demolisher that Starscream will stay Galvatron's favorite if they do not do something about it, but when they head out Sixshot traps them and heads for the Superenergon.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: Spark : Galvatron is growing and tethered to Cybertron by strands of Superenergon. Kicker and some of the Omnicons cut the strands. Ironhide and Scorponok battle, and Galvatron heads into space, but not towards Alpha Q's planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Energon
programme.desc: The Sun : Big Galvatron vs Big Optimus Prime. Lots of little battles with all the others too. Kicker gets sappy with Misha before going to destroy Unicron's "puny" remains, but something's not quite right…

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pilot- Part 1 : When a Cybertronian prison ship crashes on Earth, a new team of Autobots, led by Bumblebee, arrives to protect the planet -- and the galaxy -- from hundreds of escaped Deception fugitives!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Pilot - Part 2 : Following a mysterious message, BUMBLEBEE returns to Earth with unlikely companions to face a new Decepticon threat.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Trust Exercises : Bumblebee and his new allies struggle to find a teamwork dynamic as they protect Crown City from metal-devouring Underbite.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: More Than Meets The Eye : Bumblebee's new troop needs to hone their teamwork, but they'll have to do it on the fly as they face off against two more Decepticon fugitives – Sharkticon HAMMERSTRIKE and wolf-like STEELJAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: W.W.O.D.? : Fixit, craving the action of a field assignment, gets more than he bargained for when the Bee Team tries to keep wily Combiner CHOP SHOP from fleeing Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: As the Kospego Commands : Beleaguered Bumblebee must learn to lead in his own way as the team struggles to bring in the brutish Buffaloid, TERRASHOCK, whose stasis pod has been found by human scientists.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Collect 'Em All : Sideswipe's loyalty and dedication to the team come into question as he and Bumblebee track down THUNDERHOOF, a Decepticon taking advantage of human folklore.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: True Colors : Bee and his team track FILCH, a crow-like Decepticon with an impulsive urge to steal all things "shiny," who has taken Denny prisoner.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Rumble in the Jungle : Grimlock seems to turn against his friends, but the change of heart proves to have been caused by a miniature Decepticon taking control of his body and mind.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Mother Load : Mike and Frank accept an invitation from Indiana's Model-A Ford lady and fall hard for her ultra-rare, barn-fresh Model-A tow truck.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Fairlane Fever : Mike and Frank challenge Danielle to sell a vintage carnival ride; the guys visit a collector with amazing pieces; the guys pick the International Clown Hall of Fame; retired mechanic Norm opens his garage to reveal a 1967 Ford Fairlane muscle car.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pam's Labyrinth : Mike and Frank stumble upon a labyrinth of curious finds during a freestyle pick; the guys tour a vintage car company where the owner's entire collection of retro relics is for sale; the boys' crate of European treasure has landed in the states.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Space Oddities : For the first time ever the guys head straight to Roswell, but make a detour to a Wild West town with a million-dollar item for sale.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Bundle Brothers : Two brothers are better than one when it comes to negotiating; Mike looks to bundle in order to save his bottom line.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Greatest Pick on Earth : After a mammoth pick on a 25-acre homestead, Mike and Frank comb through the largest collection of sideshow memorabilia they've ever seen.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Invisible Pump : Circa 1920s "visible" gas pump designed to allow drivers to see the grade of fuel being pumped into their cars; Mike and Frank visit an opera house built in 1879 that has become home to vintage movie posters.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Virginia Is for Pickers : It's a picking blitz in Virginia as Mike, Frank, Robbie, and Danielle hit the road to leave no lead unturned.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Pick or Treat : The guys crawl back underground in Pennsylvania in search of the Mole Man; the guys look for rusty relics at an abandoned Oklahoma amusement park; Mike and Frank tour a former penitentiary with a seriously spooky vibe.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Auburned Out : Mike gambles on a 1935 Auburn that's either a diamond in the rough or a total dud; the guys tread dangerous ground while picking an Iowa Harley enthusiast; Dave unveils a project one year in the making that's also Mike's biggest-ever investment.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: NASCAR Challenge : The curators of North Carolina's NASCAR Hall of Fame have asked Mike and Frank to find relics that tell the history of auto racing.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Know When to Fold : The guys are running low on cash and desperate for a good pick in the South; a nostalgic owner is reluctant to part with his treasures; collection of rare automobiles; famous cartoonist's sketchbook; pottery collection found in Atlanta.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Emu Chase : Mike and Frank find themselves in a high-risk situation when they are chased by a crazy emu; Frank Wolfe gives the guys a golden lead; the guys surprise an old friend of Mike's.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Woody Wood Picker : The guys stumble upon Woody the woodcarver's 80-acre property; the guys get first dibs on an aviation museum's once-in-a-lifetime sale, and their guide turns out to be an American hero.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Picker's Dozen : A century-old Italian grocery store turned time capsule features an early 20th-century delivery truck and a secret crypt that calls Mike's name.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Captain Quirk : Frank and Dave's Florida road trip gets stranger at every turn, from a creepy collection of kitsch to a tugboat that's home to a captain and his unusual pet; back in Iowa, Mike readies the new shop for its grand opening.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Slim Pickings : A visit to a Kentucky property with a racetrack revives a rivalry between Mike and Frank; a stop in North Carolina looks like a bust until the guys unearth a one-of-a-kind TV relic.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Pat Benatar : Pat Benatar was born on January 10, 1953, in Brooklyn, New York. After high school, she married her boyfriend and moved to Virginia. Unhappy with domestic life, the couple divorced, and Benatar moved back to New York.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: So Funny I Forgot to Laugh/The Best Day Ever : Arthur thinks his jokes about Sue Ellen's new sweater are in good fun but Sue Ellen's feelings are hurt. Has Arthur become a bully? Everyone is reminiscing about their "best days." Except Arthurs. Is it possible he doesn't have one?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Show Off/Dog's Best Friend : It's the Elwood City dog show and Killer is facing off against Sebastian Winkleplotz, the snooty, championship-winning poodle. Arthur agrees to watch Amigo while Alberto's off at camp, but Pal gets worried.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal : D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here : Math, schmath. That's what Sue Ellen thinks… until she runs into a problem her artistic vision can't solve. Sue Ellen can't wait to meet her pen pal in person.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur's Toy Trouble/Spar for the Course : It's a race to the toy store after Arthur realizes he may have given away his chance at 2 million dollars! Unless Muffy, Buster, and Binky can comprise, they'll be stuck with a boring windmill at the new 18th hole at the mini golf course.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives! : Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter : Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Maria Speaks/Postcards from Binky : Maria has always been a silent fixture in Mr. Ratburn's third-grade class. But her time to speak has finally come. Can she fix her stutter? When Binky's grandparents miss his big soccer game, he decides to film a video reenactment.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing : Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie : When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's Secret Identity/Besties : Mysterious calls. Superhuman strength. Is Mr. Ratburn secretly a superhero? When Buster and Ladonna bond over a memorable trip to the movies, Arthur feels left out. Has Ladonna taken his place as Buster's best bud?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Last Day (Part 1 & 2) : It's a time of change at Lakewood Elementary as Arthur and Buster move up to 4th grade. D.W. and Bud prepare to enter kindergarten and Muffy and Francine contemplate how spending the summer away from each other will affect their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buster's Second Chance/Arthur and the Whole Truth : With the help of a little time travel, Buster turns back the clock to see what his life would be like if he were a genius. Arthur isn't happy when he discovers that Buster has been telling him some white lies, just to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's Flights of Fancy/Cereal : Will Fern give up her dreams of being a writer just because of one silly rejection? Buster tells the story of a missing cereal box on his all-new podcast. Will he be able to find the thief--and in the process--the truth?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: He Said, He Said/Bunny Trouble : A special episode of Bionic Bunny is interrupted, and Arthur and friends try to remember what comes next. D.W. is excited to be taking care of the class bunny, Larry. But Larry is feeling adventurous and and wanders off.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Bud's Knotty Problem/That’s MY Grandma! : When Bud falls in love with a snazzy new pair of boots, he might face his toughest adventure yet - learning to tie his shoes. D.W. gets jealous when Grandma Thora becomes the most popular babysitter in town.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Lend Me Your Ear/The Butler Did It : Arthur, Buster, and Brain are worried when Mr. Ratburn isn't acting like himself. He's always pleased to see them, so what’s made him change? When Mr. Crosswire gets a robot butler for Father's Day, Muffy fears Bailey may be replaced.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella's Tent of Portent/Mutiny on the Pitch : At the Elwood City Picnic, Prunella pretends she can see the future at her fortune telling booth. The Lakewood Elementary soccer team has had enough of Francine's bossy behavior.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List : Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky's "A" Game/Brain and the Time Capsule : When Binky gets an "A" on a test, Muffy and Francine are convinced he cheated. Is it possible that he actually studied? Brain makes a time capsule and gets overwhelmed by people asking to have their special belongings included.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Master Builders, Parts 1 & 2 : Buster struggles to build a birdhouse that will save the community garden from pests, while Muffy and Francine design a cat toy that will really change the pet toy game.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine and the Soccer Spy/Sue Ellen and the Last Page : When Ladonna befriends a new member of the Mighty Mountain soccer team, Francine becomes convinced she is leaking secret team info. The City Council has voted to close the Elwood City Library! Can Sue Ellen save it before it's too late?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy Misses Out/Arthur Takes a Stand : Muffy worries that her friends don't need her anymore when they plan a successful bake sale without her. Arthur thinks Mrs. MacGrady is being treated unfairly, so he decides the best to take a stand is to take a seat.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Take a Hike, Molly/Slink's Special Talent : When Rattles takes over Slink's paper route, Slink is determined to prove himself and earn his job back. When the Tough Customers go on a hike in the woods, Molly makes a few mistakes and has to apologize…but she refuses to!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Lost Dinosaur/The Princess Problem : It’s pretty hard to lose a dinosaur, but Rapty is missing! Can Bud be brave without his imaginary friend? D.W. loves the Princess Platoon series until she realizes that it doesn’t represent everyone.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Invasion of the Soccer Fans/Pal and the Big Itch : Kate appears to be hypnotized by the soccer game on the television! Can Pal, Amigo and Killer snap her out of her TV trance? Pal has to wear a cone and he takes advantage of his friends' special treatment, until it comes back to bite him.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn & The Special Someone/The Feud : Mr. Ratburn is getting married! Arthur can’t believe it. Teachers don’t have lives outside of school…do they? And Arthur and Buster get into an argument over a video game and pretty soon the entire third grade class chooses sides.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: When Rivals Came to Roost/The Longest Eleven Minutes : When Mighty Mountain’s school gets flooded, the Lakewood Elementary students have to share everything with them! The Internet is out! How will Muffy post to her blog?! How will Buster research aliens?! Looks like the most boring day ever.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Muffy’s House Guests/Binky Can’t Always Get What He Wants : Muffy is terrified when peregrine falcons build a nest right outside her bedroom window. Can her friends help her cure her ornithophobia? Binky gets cast in a TV commercial and he’s certain his career as a superstar has begun.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Betrayed by his stepfather, the King, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers to fight his way back to his rightful kingdom.

programme.title: Chaos Walking
programme.desc: A young man protects a mysterious woman in a dystopian world where all the females have disappeared, and all the men are afflicted by a force that puts their thoughts on display.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Bangkok Dangerous
programme.desc: A hitman who's in Bangkok to pull off a series of jobs violates his personal code when he falls for a local woman and bonds with his errand boy.

programme.title: The Punisher
programme.desc: The comic-book hero Punisher (Dolph Lundgren) gives New York mobsters a break and takes on the Japanese yakuza.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: A tough cop (Jason Statham) goes after a serial killer who targets police officers.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: An expert (Sylvester Stallone) in prison security joins forces with an inmate (Arnold Schwarzenegger) to break out of a top-secret, high-tech facility.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: Miles is a video game developer who inadvertently becomes the next participant in a real-life death match that streams online. While Miles soon excels at running away from everything, that won't help him outlast Nix, a killer at the top of her game.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: In the mountains of Afghanistan, a squad of Taliban fighters ambushes four Navy SEALs, who are there on a mission to eliminate a high-ranking al-Qaeda operative.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A downtrodden meter-reader (Jon Heder) enrolls in a confidence-building class in the hope of winning the gal of his dreams, then he discovers that his professor (Billy Bob Thornton) loves the same woman.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Joe & Kari Ann : Joe was sceptical when Miss Teen USA, Kari, sent him a friend request. Now, after months of communication, Joe thinks it might be the real deal, and he might have found love with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Chitara & Priscilla : Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Trina & Scorpio : Trina is a dancer who always had trouble meeting trustworthy guys, until she met Scorpio, a fellow dancer, online. Will Trina finally get to rendezvous with the only man she's ever loved?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Dorion & Jeszica : Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Lucille & Kidd Cole : Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ashley & Mike : For over seven years, Ashley has sent dramatically altered photos of herself to her soul mate, Mike, to make her look thinner and more attractive to him.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Ayissha & Sydney : Sydney and Ayissha were in an online romance for years before Sydney revealed she is not who she says. But Ayissha still loves her and seeks Nev and Max's help. (S4, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Andria & David : David is the only love Andria has ever known. Love letters and voice messages make Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, she needs to know what he is hiding that keeps him away. (S4, ep15)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Blaire & Markie : When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.desc: Mike & Kristen : Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Justin Bieber : Justin Bieber stops by the set to show off some of his Canadian pride, learn about Humanimals and what Popcorning is really all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Carmen Electra : This week on an all-new episode of Ridiculousness: the one and only Carmen Electra joins fellow Ohio native Rob Dyrdek to show us what real "Screamers" are all about and get our heart rates up with a little "Sexercise."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Ken Block : During an all-new episode of Ridiculousness: Rob and Gymkhana phenomenon Ken Block show us how not to be a "Gymkhanabe" and we see first hand what being a "Death Dodger" is all about!

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Riff Raff : This week on an all-new episode of Ridiculousness: rapper Riff Raff shows off his Brain Freeze and joins Rob in breaking down some unbelievable Middle of the Mall Sh*t.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dominic Monaghan : Lost and Lord of the Rings star Dominic Monaghan stops by the studio to marvel at some "Mild Things" and watch some innocent bystanders get "Water Damaged!"

programme.desc: A$AP Rocky : Rob is joined by Rapper A$AP Rocky who demonstrates "A Sneaky Ass Play" and shows us why fine older ladies "Still Got It."

programme.desc: Ray J : Singer Ray J drops by the studio to watch some "Knockout Entertainment" and discuss the danger of "Selfies."

programme.title: Ridiculousness

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Eddie Barbanell : Actor Eddie Barbanell and Rob take a look at some adorable "Humanimals" and feel the music with a little bit of "Mancing."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Joanna Krupa : Rob and Super Model Joanna Krupa practice some "Partial Arts" and sneak a peak at some "Man Juggies."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling V : Rob, Sterling and Chanel enjoy some "Dirty Getaways" and some unskilled workers proving why this has to be their "Last Day on the Job."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Steve Aoki : Rob and International DJ Steve Aoki practice some "Instant Yoga" and check out the crowd madness at music "Mess-tivals"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Cody Simpson : Rob Dyrdek and Australian singer superstar Cody Simpson witness some extremely "Awkward Dates" and discover the internet's most "Anti-Viral Sensations."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Fantasy Factory : Drama, Big Black and The Fantasy Factory crew stop by the studio to make some "Miracle Shots" and get "Gassed Up!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Nick Swardson : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Nick Swardson shows Rob what it means to be "Old and Horny," the lifestyle of "Day Drunks," and how he knows: "My Car's a Dick."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Snoop Dogg a.k.a. Snoop Lion : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, entertainment icon Snoop Dogg/Snoop Lion and Rob enjoy some "Over the Tizzle Celebrizzles," watch the "Foreign 5-0" bumble their jobs and see what happens when kids have "Too Much Pep."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Sterling and Chanel VI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel are in the studio "Freaking Out" over the new epidemic "Heavy Leg Syndrome" and they discover the fine art of "Extreme Sitting."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jamie Lee : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Jamie Lee teaches Rob all about "Girl Code," discusses the merits of "Drunk Sluts" and learns she's not the only one who's "Bad with Kids."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Stevie Ryan : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actress Stevie Ryan introduces Rob to "Jamie-Lynns," learns "Jelly Limbs" are an international problem, and discusses the ins and outs of "Getting Dookied."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling VII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel cross the pond to learn more about "British Dads" and "Wet Dumps" and share the new sport of "Free Biking."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Mike Epps : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actor and comedian Mike Epps and Rob watch people "Getting Zombied," stuffing food in unlikely places to "Save it for Later" and ponder who is most deserving of "Bond or Burial" money.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jenna Marbles : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Internet sensation Jenna Marbles and Rob breakdown the web's best "Face Lookers," people whose injuries are "Selfie Inflicted" and the recent "Nerf-pocalypse."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Michael B Jordan : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, actor Michael B. Jordan tells Rob about the pitfalls of Bad Bro-mates, learns some new Crying Styles and scores some Human Field Goals.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jackson Nicoll : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Bad Grandpa star Jackson Nicoll stares Rob down in "Made You Blink," sucker-punches Sterling with a "Jackson 5" and reveals why the best bathroom policy is: "Lock the Door!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Lil Duval : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedian Lil Duval stops by the studio; Rob warns of the dangers of "Evil Tires" and how having a "Florida Vibe" isn't always a good thing.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling VIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel explore the fun side of "Chatter Gas," experience some "No Pros" going down and expose true feelings in "Surprise, I Hate You."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: The Dudesons : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob watches Finland's craziest stuntmen, The Dudesons, become "Nudesons," blast butts with "Fire in the Hole" and take aim at some "Human Targets."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Nyjah Huston : On an all-new Ridiculousness, skating sensation Nyjah Huston and Rob watch some "Less Gifted" athletes, see poorly behaved guys "Getting Nyjah'd" and learn how to forget everything with some heavy-hitting "Mind Erasers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Derek Hough : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, dancer and choreographer Derek Hough and Rob discuss the "Future of Dance," see what happens to people with "Garbage Feet" and learn how to "Knock Yourself Out."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling X : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel see some beauty destroyed in "Not the Face!" redheads get slammed in "Code Red" and some distracted people meet their fate in "Obliviousness."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Tyga : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Tyga laughs with Rob as guys get nutted in "Rack City," bad drivers think they "Found a Spot" and innocent victims get painfully close to sneakers in "Check Out My Kicks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Guy Fieri : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, foodie famous Guy Fieri and Rob take a tour through the Ridiculous side of "Flavortown," learn how to "Tame Your Flame," and say farewell to "Junky Cars."

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Lead : Mankind makes use of lead, a versatile but toxic metal, for 6,000 years; mining; car battery factory; specialists remove harmful lead objects from homes and businesses; lead makes crystal sparkle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Roller Coasters: The Search for the Ultimate Thrill Ride : Since the turn of the 20th century, designers have competed to build them faster, taller, and steeper; as technology pushes the envelope with flips, weightlessness, and more g-force than a jet, they have to calculate how much can the human body take.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Rice : Rice is the world's most versatile grain; there are over 140,000 types - white, brown, long-grain, wild, short-grain, jasmine, Arborio, Basmati, black Thai, sweet, sticky - enough to satisfy any discerning palette.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dredging : Dredgers clear and deepen ports for vessels that carry megacontainers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Lead : Mankind makes use of lead, a versatile but toxic metal, for 6,000 years; mining; car battery factory; specialists remove harmful lead objects from homes and businesses; lead makes crystal sparkle.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Roller Coasters: The Search for the Ultimate Thrill Ride : Since the turn of the 20th century, designers have competed to build them faster, taller, and steeper; as technology pushes the envelope with flips, weightlessness, and more g-force than a jet, they have to calculate how much can the human body take.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Rice : Rice is the world's most versatile grain; there are over 140,000 types - white, brown, long-grain, wild, short-grain, jasmine, Arborio, Basmati, black Thai, sweet, sticky - enough to satisfy any discerning palette.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dogs : Dogs are fearless, faithful, determined, and swift, serving as hunters, soldiers, rescuers, and protectors; they are perfectly engineered marvels, combining natural instincts with complex training.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Lake Pontchartrain Causeway : Two ribbons of concrete span the largest inland body of water in Louisiana, forming the world's longest automobile bridge.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Axes, Swords and Knives : Blade implements have been a part of civilized man's arsenal since the Paleolithic Age, when sharp tools were chipped off of flint or obsidian; but with the discovery of metallurgy, people were able to forge stronger, more versatile blade implements.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Antibiotics: The Wonder Drugs : In 1941, penicillin was first used to save human life; now, bacteria has emerged resistant to every known antibiotic and scientists have begun to fear that the era of the wonder drugs is near to its end.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Strange Weapons : Strange weapons of the past and present include Japanese ninja claws, microwavelike rays, lasers, robots, the "pukelight," and a superslippery substance.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Basement : Explore basements from Pompeii to Pittsburgh; ancient Hittites, Phrygians, and Persians carved subterranean rooms for storage and shelter, Greeks and Romans valued them, Renaissance architects hid kitchens there, and Colonial Americans expanded use.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Dams : They block the force of a river, produce enough electricity to power cities, move water over hundreds of miles and irrigate fertile valleys.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Hunting Gear : They are lethal tools that ensured our survival, altered our evolution, and maintained our dominion over other animals; though hunting technology is the backbone of a multi-billion dollar sports industry, current cutting-edge gear.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Start to Finish : Every process, from beginning to end, is a unique and incredible adventure; from the fiery birth of high tech golf clubs to the cataclysmic end of old buildings, get ready to race from start to finish.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Television: Window to the World : An exploration of the world's most popular entertainment, from the boy genius who invented it to the RCA "General" who made it a reality.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Proving Grounds : On a proving ground, you can fire a missile without scaring the neighbors or lift millions of pounds in pursuit of ounces of gold. Performance is the only thing that matters, and no excuses can be given in battle or competition.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Rocks : Geological history from the Stone Age to the Space Age; moon rocks provide clues to how planets were formed; quarrying marble and granite; blasting at a sand-and-gravel pit.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Booyah for Bollywood : Sanjay and Craig get to be in a Tufflips movie in India, so Vijay comes along to reconnect with his homeland and nothing turns out the way anyone expected.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Avatar Returns (Part 2) : Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Nega Timmy/Love at First Height : Tired of being told what to do by his parents, Timmy wishes that he would have to do the opposite of whatever his parents told him. Timmy wishes he was a teenager to ride the cool new ride at the amusement park.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: 9 Lives/Dread 'n' Breakfast : 9 Lives/Dread 'n' Breakfast: When Catman tells Timmy that he’s used up 8 of his 9 cat lives saving Dimmsdale from crime, Timmy helps Catman find a "safer" job where he can still help people. Mom turns the house into a bed and breakfast!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Birthday Bashed/Momnipresent : Birthday bashed/Momnipresent: Timmy is excited for his birthday until he realizes that one year older means one year closer to losing his fairies. He spends the entire day trying to thwart all party plans, leading his Mom and Dad to think he's gone crazy!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Big Beginning Pt1 : Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Big Beginning Pt2 : Timmy goes on an adventure to search for his fairies and a magical wand that will defeat the Darkness.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Exciting Middle Part (Part 1) : Timmy learns he merely slowed down The Darkness and now he must seek a second wand to defeat this evil force. Timmy is forced to make amends with his enemies in order to fight for mankind.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wishology: The Final Ending (Part 1) : Confident and secure, Timmy feels great having won the battle against The Darkness. His world is quickly turned upside down as he learns that he didn’t win, but is now living inside The Darkness!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Anti-Poof : Anti-Poof: For every fairy, there’s an anti-fairy – thus anti-Poof is born – FOOP! It’s up to Poof to stop this anti-fairy from destroying Fairy World and his loved ones.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Add-A-Dad/Squirrely Puffs : Add-A-Dad/Squirrely Puffs: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up "a-lot-a-dads" to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Mice-Capades/Formula For Disaster : Mice-Capades/Formula For Disaster: Poof has been watching too much of a classic, yet violent "cat & mouse" cartoon. He innocently turns Timmy and Vicky into "Cheesy and Sleazy" and all mayhem breaks loose.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks : Bad Heir Day/Freaks and Greeks: Crocker wants an heir to his supposed "fortune and fame." Poof coincidentally ends up in his care and Crocker is set for life.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy : Fly Boy/Temporary Fairy: Everybody in Dimmsdale is watching the latest horror film, "Fly Boy." But Timmy isn't allowed to, so when he wishes to become a "fly on the wall".

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Crocker Shocker/Super Zero : Crocker Shocker/Super Zero: Crocker is hypnotized into no longer believing in fairies and becomes normal again. Unfortunately, Fairy World can no longer feed off his spastic energy, and all their magic shuts down.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Dadbracadbra/Timmy Turnip : Dadbracadbra/Timmy Turnip: With a little help from Timmy, Dad’s magic tricks really work. Convinced that Timmy’s dad is a fairy, Crocker is out to prove it and uncover his secret on national television.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine : One Man Banned/Frenemy Mine: After Timmy’s rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music./Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident and suddenly she is stricken by his generosity.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid : Chicken Poofs/Stupid Cupid: Poof gets the "Chicken Poofs" and turns everyone into actual chickens! Timmy steals Cupid's arrows in an attempt to make Trixie fall in love with him and go to the school "Romance Dance."

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Double Oh Schnozmo/Planet Poof : Double Oh Schnozmo/Planet Poof: Cosmo’s brother, the top secret spy, pays a visit. But when Schnozmo’s revealed to be nothing but a con man, Wanda demands that Schnozmo participate in a real spy adventure in order to spare Cosmo’s feelings.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: The Boss of Me/He Poofs, He Scores! : It's "Bring Your Kid to Work Day," and Dad takes Timmy to his office. When Timmy accidentally eats Poof (who is hiding as a marshmallow in Timmy's cereal) Timmy becomes magically talented at soccer.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Play Date...of Doom/Teacher's Pet : Play Date... of Doom/Teacher's Pet: Foop is back! He’s escaped from prison and convinced Cosmo and Wanda he’s ready for a playdate with Poof. But he’s really there to try and destroy his arch enemy again, and it’s up to Timmy and Poof to thwart his plan.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Manic Mom-Day/Crocker of Gold : When Timmy gripes that being Mom is easier than being a kid, Wanda takes the bait and switches their brains. Now Mom is Timmy, and Timmy is Mom!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Poltergeeks/Beach Blanket Bozo : When Mom and Dad mistake Cosmo for a ghost and restart their failed ghost-hunting business, Timmy wishes that the fairies would pretend to haunt Dimmsdale.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Old Man and the C-/Balance of Flour : After failing miserably on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad’s in his class!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Food Fight/Please Don't Feed the Turners : Food Fight/Please Don't Feed the Turners: Tired of Mom’s terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Take and Fake/Cosmo Rules : Timmy borrows Mark Chang’s Fake-i-fier in order to attend Trixie’s costume party. Unfortunately, he knows nothing about Yugopotamian technology and soon the device is causing Timmy to turn into all sorts of crazy creatures.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Lights Out/Dad Overboard : An exhausted Timmy makes a wish for complete darkness so he can get some sleep. But he doesn’t count on Cosmo and Wanda turning into Scary Fairies in the dark.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Farm Pit/Crock Talk : Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda’s magic to give Dad a green thumb, and when they’re swept away by a tornado, it’s up to Timmy to save the farm...and his fairies!

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Operation Dinkleberg/Spellementary School : Dad changes Timmy’s room into a surveillance center to prove that his kindly neighbor, Dinkleberg, is truly evil. Being the best neighbor ever, Dinkleberg pretends to be evil just to make Dad feel better.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Love Triangle : Poof and Foop compete to win the affections of Goldie Goldenglow, a magical new girl at Spellementary School (who’s shaped like a triangle) while participating in the Spellementary School play, "Mr. Cookie’s Happy Day."

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fighting Dirty : Boxing champion Brandon Rios tasks the artists with designing him custom mouth grills, tensions flare between an artist and a canvas, and an artist is accused of plagiarism.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Tag Team Tatt : Relationships between the artists are tested with a collaborative Elimination Challenge, and traditional tattoo expert Luke Wessman helps the judges send one more artist home.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Karma's a Bitch : Canvases sit for a Statue of Liberty tattoo in the Flash Challenge, the artists design snake-themed Elimination Tattoos, and tattoo expert Taki is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Cold-Blooded : The artists must use blood to test their gradation skills in the Flash Challenge, and guest judge Tommy Montoya goes head-to-head with the artists in the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Up in Smoke : The artists tattoo residual limbs in the Flash Challenge, canvases sit for spine tattoos, and Josh causes a controversy that jeopardizes his spot in the competition.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Heads Will Roll : The artists fight for an opportunity to design a tattoo for NFL star DeAngelo Williams in honor of his late mother, and one canvas struggles through a head tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Painstaking Portraits : The artists team up to design limited-edition headphones, family members get the same portrait during the Elimination Tattoo, and artist Tim Hendricks is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Firing Squad : Tattoo artists Mike Rubendall, Rose Hardy, and Nikko Hurtado join as guest judges, and the artists are tasked with a grim reaper-themed Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fight to the Finale : The final four artists design tattoos for blank human canvases as they battle it out for a spot in the finale and a shot at the title of Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Live : All 18 artists return to dish about their rivalries, the final three artists reveal their 35-hour back pieces, and one artist is crowned the new Ink Master.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Meet Your Maker : Apprentices and masters put their relationships on the line as they face off in a head-to-head Flash Challenge, and the judges level the playing field with blind critiques.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fight or Flight : Oliver's mentor Richard Stell joins as a guest judge to critique American traditional-style tattoos, and a twist puts the power in the hands of the artists.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Sink or Swim : The artists team up to tattoo underwater ocean scenes on the backs of their canvases' hands, and a stained-glass tattoo sparks an explosive elimination.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Tut for Tat : The artists team up to adorn sarcophagi in the Flash Challenge, canvases sit for Egyptian-style tattoos, and actor Avan Jogia is a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Problem Parts : The artists use body paint on nude models to create optical illusions, and when canvases demand tattoos on challenging body parts, the artists panic.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Firing Lines : The pressure is on as tattooing legend Mike Rubendall takes on the artists in the Elimination Tattoo, and a demanding canvas pushes one artist to the brink.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Predator/Prey : The artists team up to put their texture skills to the test in an animal-themed Elimination Tattoo, and an unexpected twist results in a shocking elimination.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Composed and Exposed : Canvases sit for personalized postcard tattoos, and the artists feel the pressure when they're tasked with designing Trash Polka Elimination Tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Like a Moth to the Flame : The Flash Challenge gets explosive when the artists paint with fire, the artists design Neptune tattoos, and veteran tattoo artist Justin Weatherholtz joins as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Hell on Wheels : The artists must paint custom designs for muscle cars, a morphing anatomical heart tattoo keeps the artists on their toes, and tattoo artist Rose Hardy is a guest judge.
