programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Bare Rescue : In a Bar Rescue first, Jon helps a failing strip club saddled with a disinterested staff, a skeevy vibe, and an off-putting name: Chix on Dix.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Hard Heads and Softballs : The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Raising Arizona : The owner of The Gallopin' Goose ruined his marriage and his bar's reputation when he had an illicit affair that resulted in a child.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Whipped Into Shape : The owner of City Bar compounded his troubles when he approved a poorly received fetish night, so Jon must help him come up with a new plan to whip up business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Perks of Being a Wallpaper : Jon needs the nice-guy owner of Champagne's Cafe, a classic Vegas dive with a storied Mafia history, to start acting like a wise guy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Antisocial Media : When a military veteran/bar owner responds to criticism of his philanthropic work with nasty comments online, his business is sent into a tailspin.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Wheels of Misfortune : A roller rink bar in a tiny desert town is in danger of closing for good if Jon can't get the hometown hero who owns it to take control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: How to Train Your Goldfish : Jon's attempt to save the YNot Sports Pub & Grub gets off to a bad start when there isn't enough staff on hand for a stress test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chase Lounge : The Tradewinds bar could shut down for good if Jon can't get a lazy stepson to step into his new role as manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Win, Lose or Brawl : Rescuing the Russell City Grill & Sports Bar was already going to be a challenge, but a violent brawl makes Jon question if it's even worth saving.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Gettin' Jigger With It : Brother and sister owners develop a bitter sibling rivalry when they take over the historic Sam Jordan's bar in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Ice, Mice, Baby : If Jon wants to save the mice-infested, touristy Fort One Bar & Lounge, he'll need to get the spoiled owner who was gifted the bar to stop taking it for granted.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Zero Drunk Thirty : A military hero about to be redeployed needs more than his bar rescued, as his problematic drinking threatens to cost him his livelihood and relationship.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Punk as a Drunk : After suffering a personal tragedy, the former punk rocker and owner of the Triple Nickel Tavern nears rock bottom, but Jon's patience only goes so far.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Don't Tell Mom the Bar is Dead : Jon has to straighten out the abrasive owner of the St8 Pub, who has squandered a generous deal from the landlord and taken advantage of his mother financially.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: I Know What You Did Last Summit : The owner of the Summit House Grill and Tap has pushed his marriage and business to the breaking point by drinking away his financial sorrows and hitting on female patrons.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Casually Tapped Out : In Bar Rescue first, Taffer must resurrect a closed neighborhood bar by reigniting the passion of the burnt-out firefighter who owns it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Struck Out at the Dugout : When the original owners of The Dugout near Wrigley Field fell behind on their rent, the landlord took over and became one of the most obstinate bar owners Jon has ever met.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The Unlucky Leprechaun : Jon has to convince the foul-mouthed co-owner of the Lucky Leprechaun to change his ways before the bar, also co-owned by his ex-wife, shuts down for good.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Desi, You Got Some 'Splainin' to Do : After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro Proposes : Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dog Days : Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Crystal Gazers : Granny and Jethro believe they have psychic abilities, but Granny's predictions stop coming true. With her reputation on the line, she picks a stock for Mr. Drysdale that could cost him a small fortune.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin : While Granny boils pool water for washing due to the "lack of a pump" and Elly May gets a feminine make-over by Miss Hathaway, cousin Pearl is back at the cabin making eyes with the visiting oil man while he gives her a ride to the nearest phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts Meet Mrs.Drysdale : Mr. Drysdale panics when Mrs. Drysdale comes back from Boston early because she'll meet the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Trick Or Treat : Granny wants to go home because folks are so unfriendly no one has come to call.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Servants : Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly's First Date : Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Pygmalion & Elly : Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Great Feud : Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Home For Christmas : Jed, Ellie May, Jethro, and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: No Place Like Home : Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Rescues Pearl : Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Back To Californy : The Clampetts pack up to return to Beverly Hills, so Jethrine tries to pack Jazzbo Depew. Elly says goodbye to her animals

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed's Dilemma : Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of the cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage : Mrs. Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly's Animals : When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Plays Solomon : Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Duke Steals A Wife : Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdale's dog.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Family Tree : Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampett's before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Buys The Freeway : Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Becomes A Banker : Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Cuts The Family Tree : Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampetts Strike Oil : Jed Clampett is told by a representative of an oil company that the swamp behind his shack is full of oil.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Getting Settled : The Clampetts begin to settle in their new home in Beverly Hills, California.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Wasting Time : Kiera and Carlos investigate a series of mysterious murders in which victims have suffered a strange injury.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Matter of Time : Kiera must decide between justice in the present or the preservation of her future.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: A Test of Time : Kagame has a plan to get rid of Kiera by killing her grandmother so that she will never be born.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: 6:02 AM EST : Walternate finds a way to wreak havoc "over here."

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Last Sam Weiss : Olivia must trust Sam Weiss in a desperate race against time.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: The Day We Died : Destiny and demise collide on the season three finale!

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Neither Here Nor There : One week after Peter Bishop saved the day and was then wiped from existence, the truce between the two worlds remains intact, and the two sides are forced to work together.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: One Night in October : A highly intelligent serial killer "over there" forces the two Fringe teams to work together as the killer's doppelganger "over here" is brought into the fold to help.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Alone in the World : The Fringe team investigates a mysterious case of murder and rapid decomposition, uncovering an amorphous figure claiming more victims. Walter's distracted by hallucinations.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Subject 9 : When Olivia discovers a dangerous force connected to Walter's past, she forces him to leave the lab for the first time in years and come face-to-face with the demons of his past.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: Novation : In the aftermath of recent shocking events, things really escalate when the translucent shapeshifters return. As the threat grows, a former Massive Dynamic scientist joins the team.

programme.title: Fringe
programme.desc: And Those We've Left Behind : STEPHEN ROOT and ROMY ROSEMONT guest star as married scientists who help the Fringe team uncover a pattern in deadly time loop anomalies.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: The Politics of Time : Trust and loyalty become issues for Kiera as evidence points to Carlos in the death of a reporter.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Playtime : Kiera and Carlos investigate a video game company that is the only tie between two murder-suicides.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Family Time : Kiera and Carlos investigate a bulk purchase of fertilizer they believe may be used to build a bomb.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: End Times : Kiera fights a ticking clock to stop a terrorist attack.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Chances : Kiera resurfaces after the mayor is killed in a brazen assassination.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Split Second : Kiera and Carlos attempt to thwart Liber8's brazen hijacking of a prison transfer.

programme.title: Continuum
programme.desc: Second Thoughts : Kiera investigates a new street drug she recognizes from her future.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Making her first British chat-show appearance in 42 years, Dame Maggie Smith with Alex Jennings, four-time Oscar-nominated Bradley Cooper, British star Sienna Miller with chat and music from Justin Bieber.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include Hollywood superstar Will Smith playing the Genie in the live-action `Aladdin', together with his co-star Naomi Scott, comedy genius Kevin Hart, and Oscar-winner Octavia Spencer starring in the psychological horror `Ma'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa: the stars of `The Amazing Spiderman 2', Andrew Garfield and Emma Stone, Hollywood star Jamie Foxx and singer-songwriter Paolo Nutini.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined by rapper, music producer, actor and film-maker Ice Cube, actor and comedian Kevin Hart who stars in comedy action sequel `Ride Along 2', `House' star Hugh Laurie, and `Broadchurch' star Olivia Colman.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa among others are Hollywood superstar Will Smith, starring in football drama `Concussion' and Ryan Reynolds, reprising his superhero role in the new X-Men film `Deadpool'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa among others are Hollywood superstar Will Smith, starring in football drama `Concussion' and Ryan Reynolds, reprising his superhero role in the new X-Men film `Deadpool'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined on the sofa by Oscar winner Julianne Moore starring in film drama `Freeheld', Australian comedian and actress Rebel Wilson in `How to Be Single', and entertainment superstars Ant and Dec.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa are Chris Hemsworth and Oscar-nominated Jessica Chastain, co-starring in `The Hunstman: Winter's War', `Spiderman' star Kirsten Dunst, promoting new sci-fi movie `Midnight Special', and comic Brit actor Stephen Mangan.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa is Oscar winner Dame Helen Mirren, Hollywood great Kevin Costner, Scottish star Ewan McGregor, comedy great Ricky Gervais and Australian superstar Eric Bana. With music from Meghan Trainor.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham is joined on the sofa by Meryl Streep, playing the socialite turned (tuneless) opera singer in `Florence Foster Jenkins', her co-star in the film, the great Hugh Grant, and actor Keeley Hawes, promoting new drama series `The Durrells'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa this time are `Great British Bake-Off' star Paul Hollywood, actor and writer Dame Joan Collins, and `Cinderella' co-stars Lily James and Richard Madden. Plus, music from DNCE, performing `Cake By the Ocean'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Among the guests on Graham's sofa this time are Hollywood star Paul Rudd, playing Ant-Man in `Captain America: Civil War', with `Sherlock' and `Hobbit' star Martin Freeman and comic actor Seth Rogen, starring in `Bad Neighbours 2'.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Guests are Hollywood star Sandra Bullock, Oscar-winner Cate Blanchett, singer-songwriter Rihanna, British actress Helena Bonham-Carter, and Golden Globe winner Sarah Paulson, all starring in the comedy `Ocean's 8'. With music from Years & Years.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are `X-Men' star James McAvoy with his co-star Sarah Paulson, iconic star of `Withnail and I' Richard E Grant, and Steve Coogan and John C Reilly. Also featuring music from Westlife.

programme.desc: Together on Graham's sofa are Hollywood stars Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, together in `La La Land', as well as actor and director Ben Affleck and British star Sienna Miller together in the crime film `Live By Night'. Plus, music from Gregory Porter.

programme.desc: Graham's guests include Hollywood stars Chris Pratt and Elizabeth Banks, Oscar-winner Jennifer Connelly, and comedian and actor Paul Whitehouse. Also featuring music from Chaka Khan, who performs `Like Sugar'.

programme.desc: Joining Graham on the sofa are British stars Eddie Redmayne and Jude Law, appearing together in `Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald'. Also, comic actor Melissa McCarthy, Oscar winner Emma Stone, and music from Rick Astley.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Mail Carriers vs. Dogs : A mail carrier learns to thwart dog attacks; two Pomeranians attack each other when left alone; a Swiss mountain dog is aggressive around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: French Bulldog Revolution : A miniature schnauzer compulsively spins in circles; four French bulldogs do not listen to their owner; a mixed breed has a leash tied so tightly it has to be surgically removed.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: The Diva's Miracle Worker : Cesar Milan is called in to help singer Patti LaBelle who is afraid of her own guard dog and a teacher who wants to unify her dog's dual personalities.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Wild Things : Actress Denise Richards needs help getting in control of her three dogs; a miniature pinscher bites visitors; a lazy basset hound.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Spike in the Heart : A woman's aggressive dogs are coming in between her and her husband; a German shepard who failed obedience school; a Sheltie barks in the car and bites other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Expecting Trouble : A lab-beagle mix needs help to be socialized; a woman worries about the aggressive behavior of her new husband's dog; a Shar-Pei behaves aggressively toward the TV.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: LA Laker Meltdown : A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Hurricane Hounds (Part 2) : A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Bad Candy : A puppy terrorizes its owner's cat; a spoiled Yorkshire terrier; a Rottweiler is aggressive toward strangers.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Monster Mastiff : An Italian greyhound mix is possessive over bones and toys; a mastiff misbehaves outside; a Yorkshire terrier takes over her owner's morning routine.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Terrible Twosome : An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Saving Cesar : Cesar visits Tijuana, Mexico, to team up with volunteers from United Hope for Animals, an organization that rescues dogs and finds them U.S. homes; a cocker spaniel taunts her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Date Breaker : A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier Kind Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Not So Goodfellas : Cesar tries to restore peace at an apartment complex where the residents' dogs do not get along; a family has trouble controlling its three dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Kill or Be Killed : An American Eskimo dog attacks doors and windows whenever people pass; a shiba inu overprotects his corgi playmate; two bulldogs are aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Lotus Blossoms : A German shepherd needs help with his territorial tendencies, and a dachshund has a habit of biting.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Year of the Dog : Cesar helps a newlywed couple whose dogs don't let them get close and another pair who met online and are nervous about introducing their dogs.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Simpsons Already Did It : Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by "The Simpsons."

programme.desc: It's Christmas in Canada : The Brovlofski family is dealt a devastating blow when Ike's Canadian birth parents show up unexpectedly. When the townspeople decide to forego Christmas gifts and take up a collection to get Ike home to South Park, the boys are distraught.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.desc: Eat, Pray, Queef : Someone plays an April Fool’s joke on the boys and it doesn’t go over well.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crème Fraiche : Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Royal Pudding : The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.desc: Freemium Isn't Free : Stan is addicted to the new Terrance and Phillip mobile game.

programme.desc: SUPER HARD PCness : It’s never been more challenging to be a PC Principal.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shocking Accusations: Abused Wife Or Abused Husband? : Marie says husband Ron has a violent temper & she fears her safety & of their 4-yr-old. She alleges Ron pushed her down the stairs & wrote "kill" on a bathroom mirror. Ron says Marie mixes her meds with alcohol. Dr. Phil cameras record the chaos at home.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parents Accused Of Murder: Will Julia and Codey Agree To Take The Polygraph Test? Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues discussions with Tommy, ex-wife, Julia & new husband, Codey, over the deaths of 19-month-old Darby & 4-year-old Kiera. Dr. Phil enlists forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht to examine the autopsy reports. Polygraph tests are offered.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Love Scams: A Mother Hooked By A Catfish : Widow Sebrina, 56, says she’s in love with her overseas boyfriend, “James,” but they've never met. She sent him more than $250,000, emptying her life savings, with payback when they marry. Is she a catfish victim? Dr. Phil confronts “James” on the phone!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Hypochondriac, High Drama, Or Really Sick: Saving Shemida Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues conversation with Shemida and her sister, Dana, who says Shemida’s 70-plus diagnoses are tearing the family apart. Dr. Phil unites this family in an effort to find answers. Is Shemida really sick, or is she addicted to attention? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Student And The Professor: Is One Stalking The Other : Dr. Phil tries to unravel the truth in a toxic relationship between a student and a professor. Did they cross the line? Will they take responsibility for their roles in this ill-fated acquaintance?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Time Is Running Out For Prison-Bound Dad: Did His Wife Blackmail Him Into Embezzling $300,000 : An emotional intervention on Dr. Phil's stage: Siblings Sarah and PJ say for the past two years their mom, Kim, chose alcohol and pills over her four children. With father Pete headed to prison for mail fraud in a few weeks, the family is falling apart.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Ex Is Evil: I Want To See My Kids : Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: I Am The Outcast Of My Family And They Threw Me Away Like Trash! : Marissa, 22, says her family treated her like an outcast in childhood & she later began working as an escort to make ends meet. Marissa faces family for the first time in 3 years on Dr. Phil's stage. Did they indeed reject her & is there hope for repair?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Our Son Was Making Millions, But Is Now Living In Our Garage With His Girlfriend : Mike and Vicki say their 37-year-old son, Ryan, once made millions running a successful real estate company, but for the past three months, he has been living in their garage with his 24-year-old girlfriend, Rachel. Dr. Phil asks Ryan tough questions.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blacklisted By Mom: Can We Speak To Our Dad Before He Dies : Four adult siblings say they've been blacklisted by their mother from seeing their dying father, a claim their mother vehemently denies. Emotions run high when this fractured family comes together on Dr. Phil’s stage. Can they put an end to the fighting?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From Top TV Newcaster To Drunken Mom : Christi says she was an Emmy-winning TV news reporter at the top of her career, but now her struggle with alcohol has left her jobless, homeless and estranged from her two adult daughters. Christi faces her girls for the first time in more than two years.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Wife Or My Girlfriend, Dr. Phil, You Decide : Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Daughter On The Brink: Did Mom Push Her Over The Edge? : Dana says daughter Melanie, 23, is a drug abuser whose behavior is ripping apart their peaceful family. Melanie admits to experimenting with drugs but says she's not addicted & she blames her mom for pushing her buttons and causing her to lose her cool.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Adoption Nightmare: I Want My Baby Back : Kristen says two years ago she was manipulated into placing her newborn for adoption with her ex-stepfather Adam and his new wife, Stacy, who Kristen says promised she could remain in the child's life. Adam & Stacy insist they did everything by the book.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Grandma Returns: Will She Finally Apologize For Her Molester Husband Pt. 2 : Ashley and Megan say they were sexually abused by their step-grandfather, and although convicted, their grandmother refuses to acknowledge the abuse ever took place. Dr. Phil helps this family begin to heal and tells what parents need to know. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: I Believe My Cousin Is Squandering Her Inheritance On A Love Scam : Sarah, 46, has sent over $1 million to her boyfriend, “Chris,” whom she has only met online. She says she dreams about marriage, once he’s able to return to the U.S. from Africa. Dr. Phil’s Facebook followers joined the effort to track down the man!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Molested & Abused For Over 10 Years, Why Won't My Grandma Believe Me Pt. 1 : Ashley and Megan claim they were molested for years by their step-grandfather and their grandmother, Peggy, knew it was happening but did not stop it. The sisters face Peggy for the first time in seven years. Why does Peggy say they are lying? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: My Husband's Big Lottery Win Is Ruining Our Marriage : Jodie says since husband Edwin won $1.66 million in a lottery pool, he's angry, distant, secretive & the marriage is in trouble. Edwin says problems started way before his money win. The couple talks to Dr. Phil wondering if their marriage can be saved.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Accusations Of Compulsive Lies, False Charges, & Coaching: A Dad's Fears About His Daughter's Safety At Mom's House Pt. 1 : Daniel says he and Lynsey are in a custody battle filled with lies and accusations and daughter Sophie, 4, is caught in the middle. Lynsey says after a visit with Daniel their daughter came home saying he hurt her. Dr. Phil sifts through the chaos. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Bitter Custody Battle: Claims Of Poison In Ice Cream, A Child Wrapped In A Garbage Bag And Inappropriate Touching: What Will The Polygraph Reveal Pt. 2 : Sandra and ex-husband Joey admit they’re in a bitter custody battle. Sandra and Joey’s mudslinging has frightening accusations, but are they telling the truth? See what happens when these parents are offered polygraph and drug tests. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Adopted Twin, Beaten, Strangled, Starved And Locked In A Room: The Exclusive Interview : Tina says her sons lived in a “house of horrors” with their biological father, Jeff, and his wife, Sandra, with reports to Child Protective Services that “fell on deaf ears.” Son Ian and Christa, also from the home, tell of horrific abuse they endured.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Love blossoms around the Villa, but a surprise recoupling ceremony sends one Islander home.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Romance ignites in the Villa as International Love Island Day kicks off, and one couple becomes closer after a surprise gesture.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: A surprise text dampens the girls spa day, forcing them to make a difficult decision that will drastically change and make a huge impact on their time left in the Villa.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The Final : The Islanders have spent six weeks in a villa in Mallorca, Spain, and now it is time to find out who is the winning couple as voted by viewers. The winning couple is given £50,000 to start their new lives together.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The boys and girls meet for the first time, and they waste no time in getting to know each other. Cartier and Gerard split off from a villa tour to get to know each other. Maurice and Jessie share a moment, while and Matthew and Vanessa cuddle up.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan gets tongues wagging around the villa, and things take an interesting turn when he gets a text message telling him he has 24-hours to steal the heart of one of the girls. Adam kicks off when he overhears a conversation about him.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan pulls Cartier aside to check she's okay after his decision and Maurice tries his luck with Cynthia. Eoghan and Jessie share a night together, while Cynthia gets a text, and the Excess Baggage challenge leads to some very unhappy housemates.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Anna and Phoebe makes waves as soon as they arrive in the villa. Phoebe admits she's attracted to Cassie. Both Anna and Phoebe get a date with Adam. Jessie plants a big kiss on Eoghan. Matt kicks off and confronts Sam.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Eoghan is stuck in a love triangle between Jessie and Anna, and can't make up his mind. Darts leads to a Phoebe and Cassie sharing a very intimate moment. Gerard and Anna get to know each other more. Cartier is enjoying spending time with Adam.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Jessie and Eoghan revel in their happiness together, while Adam and Cartier share an intimate moment. Cynthia learns some unpleasant truths about Maurice.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The residents of the villa welcome a pair of bombshell twins. It spells double trouble for one newly formed couple.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The twins send hearts racing during a raunchy strip tease in the villa. Plus, Cartier and Adam share a spark on their first date.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Jessie and Eoghan spend the night together in the hideaway. In the villa the twins and Phoebe start spreading rumours about Vanessa. Matt and Vanessa has it out and come out of the situation together still, but only just.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Gerard is relieved to still be in the villa, but now he's the only single person left. Matthew suffers from the rumours flying around the villa, and Vanessa confronts him about not coming to her defense when the whispering began.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: Feelings develop following the challenge, and two islanders will leave the villa, in the most intense dumping ever.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The Bomb Squad drops in to stir things up between the islanders. While the boys play, the girls are exiled to the Hideaway.

programme.title: Love Island Australia
programme.desc: The OG girls are worrying about the new arrivals, and not without reason. After a nude breakfast and a round of kissing, Gerard is declared the best kisser among the guys. Eoghan has eyes for Issabelle, but he'll have to win her over from Luke.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Watch Over Me : An FBI agent is killed while trying to track the location of an undercover agent. Now, NCIS must find the missing agent before the criminals he was investigating do.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Missing Time : The team investigates the disappearance of a department of defense officer who was looking into a recent UFO sighting; Anna makes a bold decision about her future.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fortune Favors The Brave : Sam investigates the murder of an Iranian exile working to overthrow the current regime, and he must also try to save Agent Roundtree, a new agent who's having an unexpectedly adventurous first day on the job

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Love Kills : When the team investigate the murder of a man about to reveal the source of a counterfeiting operation, an old acquaintance becomes their prime suspect and reveals the true reason for her return; Deeks struggles during training.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Fait Accompli : An organized crime leader tries to buy stolen defense technology; Deeks is kicked out of NCIS training only to find that Hetty has a life-changing surprise for him.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Russia, Russia, Russia : When Callen goes to the National Counterterrorism Center on the pretext of interrogating a Russian asset from the crashed plane case he investigated months earlier, the tables are turned and he is accused of being a Russian agent.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Can’t Take My Eyes Off You : As Nell keeps Callen in the dark about the team's search for Katya, Callen tracks down the person tailing him in a remote location teeming with Russians.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Red Rover, Red Rover : To rescue Joelle from further torture by the Russians, Callen and the team must offer up Anna as bait to Katya; Callen finally discovers who accused him of being a Russian spy.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Noble Maidens : Callen and the rest of the team go all-out to rescue Anna. But even if Anna is found, there is no guarantee she and Callen will have a future.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Imposter Syndrome : NCIS obtains a hard drive containing a realistic deep fake video of a deceased terrorist and must retrieve the dangerous technology behind it; communications are hijacked during their mission.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Signs Of Change : Agents in Los Angeles' Office of Special Projects team track criminals who threaten national security.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Through The Looking Glass : When a naval intelligence officer is tortured and murdered, NCIS discovers that CIA operatives are being killed in the same way

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Tale Of Two Igors : Deeks is kidnapped by an associate of Kirkin's who is in need of his help; NCIS investigates the shooting of a militarized dolphin equipped with a Russian microchip; Beale makes Nell an interesting offer.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Subject 17 : While Callen suspects Hetty of keeping secrets about his past and Joelle surfaces in her quest to capture Katya, NCIS must track down an informant whose life is in danger.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fukushu : NCIS takes the case personally when an LAPD officer’s father, a beloved elderly Japanese American veteran, is the victim of a vicious hate crime.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Indentured : Sam and Kilbride clash when a case involving an arms dealer responsible for the slaughter of ATF agents leads them to a well-connected colonel and friend of Kilbride

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sorry For Your Loss : As Callen continues hunting Katya, Kilbride enlists NCIS to help find a truckload of stolen guns.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Divided We Fall : When an NCIS mission to protect a compromised undercover agent goes completely sideways, the agents are individually interrogated to find out what really happened. Also, Kilbride must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Sundown : Sam negotiates and Rountree goes undercover, when a man takes a busload of hostages and threatens to blow it up unless his daughter’s war crimes are posthumously cleared.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Lost Sailor Down : NCIS investigates the apparent suicide of a Navy intelligence officer who leapt to his death after taking LSD. Also, while Kensi is away, Deeks makes plans to redo the backyard without her input.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al…with Kelly : Al and Kelly feign illness to avoid going to Wanker County with Peg and Bud. Al looks forward to his quiet and peaceful weekend until Kelly gets sick.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Sue Casa, His Casa : Bud's new driver's license portends bumper cars on the roadway. When bud t-bones a Mercedes, Al sees an opportunity to clean up in court. At least he has hope. Losing his lawsuit hurt but what he goes through to pay off the settlement is truly painful.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Unnatural : Al is cut from the neighborhood softball team just before the big game. When his all-star replacement is knocked out in the last inning, however, his team and family have to come crawling back.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Look Who's Barking : Told from the point of view of Buck, he runs away from the house feeling neglected. Behind a diner, he picks up a female dog, whom he brings home. He quickly regrets it, as the new dog gets all the attention from Bud and Kelly.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: A Man's Castle : Peg takes an interior design course and her first assignment is to redecorate one room in her house. Unfortunately for Al, she chooses his spare bathroom.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: All Night Security Dude : When a second-floor aerobics studio, full of terribly overweight women, collapses into the shoe store, Al is laid off while the store is being repaired. Al then gets a night job as a security guard at his old high school, Polk High.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Oldies but Young 'Uns : Al is haunted by a tune on the radio he can hum but not name, and he gets no help from Peggy or the D'Arcy's.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Weenie Tot Lovers & Other Strangers : Al forgoes giving money to Bud for a class trip to Washington DC in order to give to Kelly who's going to an audition for the Miss Weenie Tot spokesperson. When Kelly lands the spot, Al gets a year's supply of his favorite mock food: Weenie Tots.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Kids! Wadaya Gonna Do? : Al and Peggy go over to watch a video at Marcy and Jefferson's house and proceed to take over the place.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Top of the Heap : Al Bundy's childhood pal, Charlie Verducci, and the guy's dim-witted son Vinnie attend a high society fundraiser in this pilot for the short-lived TV series, 'Top of the Heap.'

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Better Shop Around - Pt 1 : Al cannot afford to buy an air conditioner for the hot summer. After an attempt to install an old experimental model, (which results in a neighborhood blackout) Al moves his family into the local supermarket.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Better Shop Around - Pt 2 : The Bundys and Darcys shop 'til they drop to see who will win $1000 in groceries. Needless to say, Marquis of Queensbury rules will not apply.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Route 666 - Pt 1 : While on their way to Los Angeles for a "Shoe Convention," the Bundy's car breaks down in the small town of Lucifer, New Mexico where they meet an old prospector who gives them a map to an old gold mine in the area in exchange for their car.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Route 666 - Pt 2 : Al, Peggy, Kelly, Bud, Jefferson, and Marcy find the gold mine in the desert. Al discovers the first gold nugget and everyone but the feeble-minded Kelly winds up with a bag full of gold.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buck the Stud : A man offers the Bundy's $10,000 if Buck will breed with his champion dog, Lady Bird. So, Al has to coach Buck into knowing the varieties of breeding with other dogs the proper way.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: And Baby Makes Money : After Al's bachelor uncle dies, he leaves $500,000 to the first of his relatives to produce a newborn baby named after him. Al overcomes his usual aversion to sex with Peg.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Married…with Who : After a drinking binge at a bankers party, Marcy reveals herself to be married to a mysterious hunk named Jefferson D'Arcy, whom Al finds out to be a gigolo and con artist.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Godfather : Al becomes the boss of the neighborhood after Kelly starts dating an influential city councilman.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Look Who's Barking : Told from the point of view of Buck, he runs away from the house feeling neglected. Behind a diner, he picks up a female dog, whom he brings home. He quickly regrets it, as the new dog gets all the attention from Bud and Kelly.

programme.desc: Route 666 - Pt 2 : Al, Peggy, Kelly, Bud, Jefferson, and Marcy find the gold mine in the desert. Al discovers the first gold nugget and everyone but the feeble-minded Kelly winds up with a bag full of gold.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buck the Stud : A man offers the Bundy's $10,000 if Buck will breed with his champion dog, Lady Bird. So, Al has to coach Buck into knowing the varieties of breeding with other dogs the proper way.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: She's Having My Baby - Pt 1 : Marcy and Jefferson announce that they are expecting a baby, sending Al into pearls of laughter saying that it's the end of Jefferson's life, until Peggy announces the same.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: She's Having My Baby - Pt 2 : Peggy and Marcy's constant demands for belly rubbing and expensive baby accessories drive Al crazy, prompting him to make a run for it.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: If Al Had a Hammer : When Al unearths his father's old hammer, he decides to turn the garage into his own private room to escape his pregnant wife.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Cheese, Cues and Blood : Kelly earns a quick $1,000 at hustling pool to buy a gown for the local Miss Cheese competition, and a suspicious Al is out for blood, mistakenly thinking that Kelly is into prostitution.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Looking for a Desk in All the Wrong Places : While Peggy is away helping Marcy recover her precious childhood belongings that Jefferson auctioned off and gambled away the money, Al, Kelly, and Bud hold an anti-baby meeting and make plans for a new "Bundy World Order.”

programme.title: Pluto Classic Movie Westerns
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: The Singing Hill
programme.desc: Gene Autry must stop a society girl from selling her ranch to a banker, upsetting the nearby ranchers. Gene has the girl declared incompetent with the help of a judge, to try to protect the ranch.

programme.title: The Strawberry Roan
programme.desc: Gene’s first color film stars Champion in the title role as a wild outlaw stallion, branded a killer, and the two-fisted cowboy who fights off a gun-crazed posse to win justice for the noble animal.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Sons Of New Mexico
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the guardian of a wayward boy who is in debt. Gene sends him to the New Mexico Military Institute, where he falls in with bad companions and is framed for a murder of an ex-jockey.

programme.title: Red River Valley
programme.desc: Cowhand Gene Autry and his partner, Frog Millhouse, help Arizona cattlemen who are trying to build a dam that will bring water to their parched lands. Unscrupulous businessmen attempt to hinder these plans for their own profit.

programme.title: Blue Montana Skies
programme.desc: Gene Autry heads North to apprehend fur smugglers plundering the trappers' pelts, and then return to the U.S. When the trail leads to the H-H dude ranch owned by a beautiful gal, the action heats up.

programme.title: Ride, Tenderfoot, Ride
programme.desc: Gene Autry inherits and runs a meat packing company. To get Gene to sell, the lady owner of a rival company starts a feud to derail Gene, who tries to recover by using rallies, parades, and bands.

programme.title: Greaser's Palace
programme.desc: A parable based on the life of Christ. This ain't your father's Bible story, full of references about the destruction of the world through massive constipation and a New Mexican setting.

programme.title: Cattle Annie And Little Britches
programme.desc: Two young aspiring outlaws (Amanda Plummer and Diane Lane) manage to join what’s left of the Doolin-Dalton gang, led by the aging Bill Doolin (Burt Lancaster). The gang’s heyday may be far behind them, but there’s still plenty of adventure left!

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Live from Lanford : The Conners debate voting reasons; Louise's offer threatens to take her from Lanford, prompting family intervention in Dan's relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Brothers, Babies and Breakdowns : Dan avoids grief until it confronts him; Ben and Darlene tackle baby fever; Dwight's nervous to fill in for an injured chef.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bad Dads and Grads : Dan connects with his half-brother but struggles with their father's unequal treatment; Jackie hits it off with a fun married couple.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jeoparde, Sobriete, and Infidelite : Darlene makes a decision about her trip to Hawaii, leading to a heated encounter with Barb; Becky gives a presentation on addiction to Mark's class.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two Proposals, a Homecoming and a Bear : Two proposals bring big changes to the Conner family; Jackie uses her Jeopardy infamy to her advantage.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Trucking Live in Front of a Fully Vaccinated Studio Audience : The Conners continue to deal with the pandemic while navigating breakups and newfound sobriety, all while planning an upcoming wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Education, Corruption and Damnation : After Ben declines Darlene's proposal, she starts to ponder why she tends to be so negative in life, prompting her to start a journey of self-discovery, which leads to Pastor Phil.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sober Sex, Plastic Silverware and Losing My Religion : Part of Becky's recovery program mandates she make amends with people she has lied to over the years, leading her to meet up again with a former high school friend; Darlene visits with Pastor Phil; Louise continues planning her wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Wedding of Dan and Louise : It's Dan and Louise's wedding day, but it's a far-from-perfect walk down the aisle, especially when a weather report forecasts that a tornado is headed for Lanford creating chaos and surprises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Peter Pan, The Backup Plan, Adventures in Babysitting and A River Runs Through It : The Conner home is decked out for Halloween, despite the leak in the roof that forces Dan and Louise to cancel their honeymoon; Becky surprises the newlyweds and takes them on a virtual adventure around the world.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Young Love, Old Love and Take This Job and Shove It : Darlene worries about Mark making friends at his new school; Mark turns to Ben for personal advice; Becky finds herself thriving in college and starts thinking about her future plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Let's All Push Our Hands Together For the Stew Train and The Conners Furniture : Jackie devises an offbeat plan to serve the customers at The Lunch Box, it's anything but smooth; Dan begins to sell furniture to make room for his new bride and her things.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Yard Sale, Phone Fail and a College Betrayal : As Louise starts to move into the Conner home, Dan decides to sell the furniture set he bought for Roseanne when they were first married; he soon finds parting with the furniture harder than he thought it would be.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Exes, Role Playing and a Waterbed : Darlene brings Nick to the hardware store, where they run into Ben, who invites Nick to join him at The Lunch Box to watch a Bears game.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Spills, Pills and the Midnight Lasagna : The Conners celebrate Mark when he makes Dean's List at his new magnet school; Jackie continues to navigate her relationship with Neville.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Patriarchs and Goddesses : Darlene continues to navigate her breakup with Ben; Dan offers to talk with Aldo's dad when he doesn't approve of Harris and Aldo's relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Hot for Teacher and Writing a Wrong : The Conner clan copes with life in Lanford in a way they never have before.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sex, Lies and House Hunting : Darlene loves the house she's looking at, but when the realtor says she has a chance of getting the house if she's part of a couple, she convinces Ben to pretend to be her partner.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Triggered : The family is locked down in their home due to a shooting incident in the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Messy Situation, Miscommunication and Academic Probation : When Becky outs her relationship with Professor Davis, it's his erratic behavior that sends Becky down a path to reevaluate their relationship.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Gas Pump, House Dump and Stew Volcano : Darlene searches for a home that she and Becky can afford; after an attempt to boost business at The Lunch Box goes awry.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Big Negotiations and Broken Expectations : Dan enlists the help of a few friends for the funeral-home remodel; Louise points out that Dan's generosity with his time benefits everyone but her.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Best Laid Plans, a Contrabassoon and a Sinking Feeling : Darlene struggles to cope with the stress of construction; Lou returns as Mark's combative contrabassoon teacher.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Ring Circus : Ben and Darlene are excited to share their good news with the family, but Neville and Jackie, and Aldo and Harris, share their own very similar news.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Judge and a Priest Walk Into a Living Room… : The Conners gear up for a megawedding; Jackie & Neville, Darlene & Ben, Harris & Aldo are planning for a big day, but discover that some of the couples may not be on the same page.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Double Honeymoon and Seeing Double : In an effort to save money, Darlene and Ben, and Jackie and Neville head off on their joint honeymoon, where their cost-saving measures contribute to a tension-filled getaway.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Scenes From Two Marriages: The Parrot Doth Protest Too Much : When Jackie moves in with Neville, he shows up to their home with an excess of animals from his vet office; Darlene and Ben argue Darlene is turning into her father.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Driving, Dating and Deceit : Mark is anxious to get his driver's license; Darlene attempts to teach Mark to drive, but her frantic energy sends him running to Ben for help; Harris meets a new guy online.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Parent Traps and Heart Attacks : When a relative passes away unexpectedly, the family must debate about who should gain custody of a jaded nephew, who is just shy of his 18th birthday.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Little Weed and A Bad Seed : Problems arise on Beverly Rose's first day of kindergarten; Becky and Darlene have a disagreement; Harris advises an unusual solution for Dan's back pain.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Book Bands and Guillotine Hands : The Conners grapple with parenthood, dating, financial pressures, aging and in-laws in working-class America.

programme.title: The Conners

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Mystic Manor/Flop Goes the Weasel/The Legend of Long Jon : Garfield discovers a famous "haunted house" attraction is closed./Wade inadvertently defeats a local weasel./Jon discovers he is related to a traitor of George Washington.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 12 : The ancestor of one of the most hungry pirates sets sail. Philo is back to help give motivational speeches to the weasel and Wade.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends
programme.desc: Episode 1 : Garfield dreams of being pioneers in outer space./Roy gets a watch for his birthday./Jon's attempt to break a habit by listening to a record in his sleep.

programme.desc: Invasion of the Big Robots/Shelf-Esteem/Housebreak Hotel : Garfield wakes up to discover he's in the wrong cartoon./Orson can't pick up a book without reading it./Garfield and Odie stay in a ritzy pet hotel.

programme.desc: Episode 8 : Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Exorcism In The ER : A man goes into anaphylactic shock; a tough guy fears needles; a man stabs himself with a ninja sword; a patient believes she needs an exorcism.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: The Golden Hour : A soldier comes into the ER with a stab wound, and a woman overdoses on diet pills.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Toilet Paper Eating Patient : A woman complains of stomach pains after eating toilet paper; an inmate has a 108-degree fever.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Naughty Nomad : When a client rolls into Count's Kustoms with a beautiful 1955 Chevy Nomad, Danny can't help but want the car for his collection.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Low Riding Lincoln : Lonnie, one of the shop's long time painters, wants to give his Lincoln lowrider a new, but simple, paint job. Meanwhile, Mike and Paul find a Rolls Royce that used to belong to Donny and Marie Osmond.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Champion Chopper : When the World Series of Poker guys want a Count's Kustoms chopper as the ultimate online giveaway, Danny is determined to make it something special. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan check go for a spin in a 1957 Bel Air.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Big Truck Custom Combo : Danny is commissioned to custom paint a brand new pick-up for a charity auction for the local YMCA. But Danny can't stop at paint, he adds the ultimate accessory a matching chopper that fits in the back.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Heavy Metal Caddy : Brann Dailor, drummer for the Grammy-winning heavy metal band Mastodon, brings in his 1970 Cadillac Coupe DeVille for some much needed Counts Kustoms love.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds' Rides : Vegas Golden Knights goalie Marc-Andre Fleury comes to Count's Kustoms looking for an All-American muscle car fit for a three-time Stanley Cup champion.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Red, Hot, and Dangerous : Danny has big plans for a little street rocket known as a Manta, and the crew commissions an 80s era Corvette that the owner wants to bring into the new millennium. Shannon meets a motorcycle racer who wants her Harley XR1200 customized.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny Doubles Down : The massive auto extravaganza known as SEMA is rolling into Las Vegas, and this time Danny will be ready. He's getting not one, but two incredible Counts Kustoms creations ready for the big show.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Flatheads Forever : Arnold brings Dan two interlocking projects. He wants FantomWorks to transform his 1946 Ford Panel Wagon into a classic tour-mobile, and he also wants Dan to fix the 1941 Harley Flathead motorcycle that will ride in the back.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Brick by Bricklin : Walter brings his 1975 Bricklin back to FantomWorks with the hope that Dan can fix problems that were created when it was built. And then add missiles. Tim’s 1954 Imperial hasn’t run in decades and everything on the car is locked up solid.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Metro Mayhem (Part 1) : David and Chuck want their family heirloom 1961 International Harvester Metro Van converted into a state-of-the-art restomod, with all the trimmings. David asks Dan to find and restore a very specific car he’s always wanted: a 1966 Lincoln Convertible.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Metro Mayhem (Part 2) : FantomWorks epic 4 year long wrestling match with the 1961 International Harvester Metro concludes with an incredible, one-of-a-kind van. Ray wants his 1969 ZL1 to match the number 68 rally car, but he needs Dan’s rare Winters stamped 427 COPO motor.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Big Truckin' : Ian transplants an old 1948 cab onto a modern roll-off truck for his friend Bill.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Bugged Out : Ian takes a stock Volkswagen Bug to pieces to create a unique car that stands out from the others.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Chopper Trike : Ian enters the motorcycle world as he turns a childhood dream into reality.

programme.title: Full Custom Garage
programme.desc: Hot Rod : Ian Roussel redesigns a 1931 Ford jalopy into a 1950s-style hot rod for a client.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Hockey Player Down : A young girl, recently hit by a hockey puck, is now mysteriously paralyzed from the waist down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Dr. Robot : Doctors use a robot operated by a specialist at another hospital to treat a seizing 7-year-old boy.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: Old School Medicine : A surgeon requires urgent treatment after falling off a bed while trying to help his patient.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds : Martha's azalea grove is bursting with the last flowers of spring; then everything you need to know about hostas; Martha takes up bird watching.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Easy Homemade Dumplings : Martha, Monica Tran Carden, and Andrew Yu make homemade dumplings; Martha and Monica hand-make wontons and pork dumplings; Andrew and Martha prepare jade dumplings and pork and shrimp dumplings.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Bagel Show : Martha samples bagel toppings and is joined by Gary Greengrass, owner of Barney Greengrass, an NYC staple; at PopUp Bagels, Martha makes bagels and constructs breakfast sandwiches with Adam Goldberg.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha's Favorite Cakes : Martha makes the classic meringue cake from Casa Cipriani with pastry chef Alessia Tomassetti; Martha and bakery owner Lucie Franc De Ferriere bake a pear raspberry cake with jam and maple buttercream.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Vegan Cuisine Redefined : Martha and Chef Daniel Humm make redefined vegan dishes; Martha and Chef Daniel make a refreshing cocktail and gazpacho, followed by mushroom and seaweed baked rice and a rhubarb cobbler for dessert.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Amazing Houseplants : Martha brings the outdoors inside the home and shares her love of houseplants; she shows how to take care of the most popular houseplants and how to propagate them to create new plants.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The World of Succulents : Martha explores how to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse; Seed Starting : Martha takes us inside her vegetable greenhouse to see how she has turned her harvest into a year-round bounty; she collects, stores, and sows seeds, and makes her perfect green drink.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Poaching : Using poached chicken breast in chicken salad sandwiches and Cobb salad; poached salmon steaks; poached eggs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Perfect Roast : Rib roast; crown roast of pork; stuffed turkey breast; the best cuts for roasting.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Soups : Homemade chicken soup; minestrone; veloute.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Vegetables : Blanching, steaming and roasting vegetables.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Onions : French onion soup; balsamic-glazed pearl onions; fried onion rings.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Roasting : Roast rack of lamb; salt-roasted sea bass; saffron-roasted chicken wings.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Know Your Vegetables : Steamed artichokes with tarragon butter; braised leeks; fried okra; whole-roasted garlic.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Coffee Cakes : Rhubarb upside-down crumb cake; jam-filled coffee cake muffins; streusel cake; glazed lemon-blueberry coffee cake.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Tarts and Tartlets : Apple tart Tatin with a pâte brisée crust; chewy chess tart with a cookie crust; lemon meringue tartlets; mini rhubarb and raspberry galettes.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Breakfast : Dutch baby pancake; oven-baked French toast; quiche made with peas and ham; cheese, ham and onion strata.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Bar Cookies : Peanut butter and jelly bars; brownies; pecan bars with a toffee-like topping; fruit and nut energy bar.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Holiday Breads : Italian panettone with dried fruit and almonds; German stollen with dried fruit and marzipan; Greek Orthodox Easter bread embellished with bright red eggs.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Nuts : Traditional linzertorte; oatmeal cookies with a peanut butter filling; walnut cake; pecan tart.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Plot of the Panther Devas : The Panther Tribe attacks from the west.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Target: Sesshomaru and Inuyasha : Inuyasha slices through the Panthers' barrier with his red Tetsusaiga, and Inuyasha and Koga make their way into the castle town.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Panther Tribe and the Two Swords of the Fang : The Panther King, the general of the Panther Tribe, begins to move with the power of the Shikon Jewel. Inuyasha and Sesshomaru attack the mummy.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kirara Come Home! : Kirara disappears. Sango is worried. Shippo deduces Kirara's reasons for disappearing.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kikyo and Kagome: Alone in the Cave : Kagome is lured to a cave by a voice calling for help. Kagome enters the cave and meets Kikyo.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Truth Behind the Nightmare: Battle in the Forest of Sorrow : Garamaru, a poisonous moth demon, has trapped Kagome and the others in a cocoon. Kagome and the others are each suffering within their nightmares.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Snow from Seven Years Past : Snow is falling out of season. Miroku is abducted by Koyuki, a mysterious woman.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Assault on the Wolf-Demon Tribe! : A giant ogre appears in the mountains to the north. His name is Kyokotsu. Kyokotsu eats demons when he can. He attacks the demon wolf tribe.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Band of Seven Resurrected! : The Band of Seven, a group of ghosts, have been brought back to life.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Stealthy Poison Master: Mukotsu! : The match between Jakotsu and Inuyasha is stopped when Mukotsu interferes. Mukotsu kidnaps Kagome to make her his bride.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Ghastly Steel Machine! : Kagome, Miroku, and Sango have been weakened by Mukotsu's poison.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome, Miroku, and Sango: Desperate Situation! : At the temple, Inuyasha checks to see of Kagome and the others are safe. He ends up trusting Renkotsu. Ginkotsu bombards him.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha Shows His Tears For The First Time : Kagome, Miroku, and Sango have stopped breathing. Inuyasha searches for the Band of Seven to avenge them.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Secret of the Pure Light : Inuyasha and the gang approach the light of a Sacred Jewel which appears to belong to the Band of Seven, but the light is not corrupt.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Hidden in the Mist: Onward to Mt. Hakurei! : Suikotsu's Band of Seven personality awakens and fights Inuyasha. When the children call out to him to turn back, he holds his head in pain.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Enter Bankotsu, The Leader of the Band of Seven : There is a barrier around Mt. Hakurei that purifies demons or anything evil.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Big Clash: Banryu versus the Wind Scar : The battle between Bankotsu and Inuyasha begins. Meanwhile, Sesshomatu comes to Mt. Hakurei.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Afloat on the Lake Surface: the Barrier of Hijiri Island : There is a holy island in a lake surrounded by mist. Saint Hakushin, who become a living Buddha a hundred years ago, is venerated there.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Sacred Vajra and the Mystery of the Living Buddha : Bankotsu gets Kagome and the others involved in his battle with Inuyasha. Inuyasha is angered that his friends are getting hurt, and corners Bankotsu.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Koga's Solitary Battle : Mt. Hakurei's holy barrier prevents demons from entering it. Saint Hakushin helped Naraku, and placed the barrier.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Lured by the Black Light : Mt. Hakurei gets stronger, and Kikyo is prevented from going into its hold ground.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Exposed Face of Truth : Suikotsu cannot kill Chiyo and the others. Jakotsu stops him. He senses an attack from Sesshomaru.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Vanished in a River of Flames : Ginkotsu has died, and Renkotsu uses his shard without permission. In doing so, he has betrayed Bankotsu. He cannot go back anymore.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Into the Depths of Mt. Hakurei : The evil within Mt. Hakurei is Naraku's demons and Kagura. Miroku risks his life to save Sango, by opening his Wind Tunnel and sucking in the demons.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Divine Malice of the Saint : Miroku and Sango come face to face with the Saint Hakushin's mummy on Mt. Hakurei. The saint tells them his reason for helping Naraku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Fare Thee Well: Jakotsu's Requiem : Inuyasha regains his demon powers. He defeats Jakotsu, and hurries to Mt. Hakurei. Renkotsu has rebellious feelings towards Bankotsu.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Final Battle: The Last and Strongest of the Band of Seven : Mt. Hakurei's barrier disappears. Inuyasha is worried about Kagome. Kagome heads to Mt. Hakurei with Koga and the others.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Power of Banryu: Duel to the Death on Mt. Hakurei : Miroku and Sango see a mysterious lump of flesh in the depths of Mt. Hakurei.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Beyond the Darkness - Naraku Reborn! : Naraku has gained a new body and has been reborn.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Farewell Kikyo, My Beloved : Mt. Hakurei is destroyed. Koga falls to the bottom of it. Inuyasha saves him.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show

programme.desc: Hollywood Icons Of The '60s - Walter Matthau (3/23/82) : Stardom is bad for your health. Walter Matthau dons dark glasses to disguise an eye problem, jokes about his roommate in the hospital and the awful food.

programme.desc: Comic Legends Of The '60s - Joan Rivers (10/15/82) : Hear what Joan Rivers has to say about retouched magazine covers, Gone With The Wind and Dolly Parton. Plus, Johnny welcomes Japanese TV personality Tetsuko Kuroyanagi.
