programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Jersey : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Hawaii : Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel : Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Copenhagen : Tony explores Copenhagen, the economic and cultural center of Denmark.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Sicily : Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Detroit : Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tokyo : Tony travels to Tokyo in search of the city's dark, extreme underside.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Africa : Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Las Vegas : Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Punjab : Tony dives into the state of Punjab, India, starting off in Amritsar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Lyon, France : Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mexico City : Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Salvador, Brazil : Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mississippi Delta : Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Russia : Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Thailand : Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Shanghai : Anthony Bourdain explores the vibrant, dynamic city of Shanghai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Zanzibar : In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The Chaco : A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Battle of the Damned
programme.desc: After a deadly viral outbreak, Max Gatling (Dolph Lundgren) leads several survivors and a band of robots against an army of the walking dead.

programme.title: Beauty and the Least
programme.desc: Ben (Ben Banks), a 28-year-old journalism student, is a master of avoiding responsibility. His ambition is finally awakened when he meets a gorgeous woman (Mischa Barton) and is drawn into a conspiracy.

programme.title: The Bouncer
programme.desc: A bouncer agrees to help Interpol hunt down a crime boss so that he can regain custody of his daughter from social services.

programme.title: Enemies Closer
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL (Tom Everett Scott) becomes trapped in the wilderness with drug runners and an old enemy (Orlando Jones).

programme.title: 47 Meters Down: Uncaged
programme.desc: With their air supply steadily dwindling, four teenage divers must navigate the underwater labyrinth of claustrophobic caves and eerie tunnels to escape from swarming great white sharks.

programme.title: Down the Shore
programme.desc: Dark secrets come to light when the owner (James Gandolfini) of a rundown amusement park encounters a stranger (Edoardo Costa) who brings news of his younger sister's death.

programme.title: AWOL-72
programme.desc: An AWOL Marine with secret government information is hunted by Russian special operations soldiers, the L.A.P.D., and a dangerous assassin.

programme.title: Grand Piano
programme.desc: A concert pianist who has stage fright finds a threatening note written on his sheet music just moments before a performance.

programme.title: Close Range
programme.desc: A man (Scott Adkins) must protect his family when thugs from a drug cartel and corrupt lawmen invade his secluded ranch.

programme.title: Jurassic Attack
programme.desc: After surviving a crash landing, soldiers (Gary Stretch, Corin Nemec) must battle an army of dinosaurs in a remote jungle.

programme.title: Drunk Parents
programme.desc: After one too many drinks, two parents come up with an elaborate plan to hide their ever increasing financial difficulties from their daughter and judgmental social circle.

programme.title: The Watermen
programme.desc: Youngsters stranded on the ocean after their yacht is sabotaged, find themselves rescued by a trawler and given something to drink, where they pass out. When they wake up on an island, they have to fight the crew to survive or be ground up as bait.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Most Wanted : OA and Maggie team up with members of the FBI's Fugitives Department to track down a person wanted for murder who is also on America's Top 10 Most Wanted list.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Conflict of Interest : The team must take down a dangerous drug ring after an American diplomat is killed while being used as a pawn; Jubal and OA try to help friends from their past fight off their inner demons.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: Caesar : Barnes goes on a dangerous undercover mission involving an ambitious gang leader who is plotting turf wars and massacres across the Bronx in a bid for more power.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: American Dreams / MW: Reveille : After taking down a terrorist, the FBI and their Fugitive Task Force partners search for the terrorist's wife, who is determined to follow through with her husband's deadly plan

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: He Who Speaks Dies : The Fly Team and Smitty head to Morocco when a commercial aircraft flying from New York to Athens is grounded and an American citizen on board goes missing. Also, Kellett's relationship with Erdős (Miklós Bányai) continues to blossom.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Trust : The Fly Team lends a helping hand to the Hungarian National Police when one of their police officers is accused of murdering a couple in Budapest. Also, Kellett questions her relationship with Lieutenant Erdős.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: Jealous Mistress : The Fly Team heads to Vienna to find the culprit of an acid attack on a rising American prima ballerina. Also, Smitty receives some troubling intel from a familiar face.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: What Lies Beneath : When a controversial senior leader from Egypt comes to New York for a heart transplant, OA struggles to balance his personal opinion with his professional duty when he is assigned to the security detail.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Appearances : After a decorated FBI agent is murdered, the team investigates and learns that the man led a double life; Maggie struggles with what information she should reveal to the agent's widow, who is also her personal friend.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The Hunt : While exploring a planet, the team is attacked and members are taken captive by an alien creature. The team must turn to Varro and his Lucian team for help. Meanwhile, on Destiny, Eli and Brody mistakenly trap Brody in a cryogenic device.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Common Descent : Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Full Alert : When O'Neill finds the door to his home forced open and former Vice President Kinsey waiting for him inside, his first instinct is to call the police. But he allies himself with Kinsey when he learns of a rogue organization known as The Trust.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 1) : Lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell, the newest member of the SG-1 team, sets out on a mission with Daniel Jackson, Teal'c and Vala to uncover a stash of hidden ancient riches. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 2) : Still bound together by the Jaffa bracelets, Daniel Jackson and Vala are transported to a galaxy populated by worshippers of a potentially threatening authority called the Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Origin : Daniel and Vala learn that their reactivation of an ancient communications device has inadvertently exposed Earth to the wrath of the group of unforgiving deities called Ori. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Epilogue : Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Blockade : When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Gauntlet : After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Rising (Part 1) : A new Stargate team, lead by Dr. Elizabeth Weir (Torri Higginson) embarks on a dangerous mission to a distant galaxy , where they discover the mythical lost city of Atlantis -- and a deadly new enemy that feeds on human fear. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Moebius (Part 1) : Jackson receives documents that point to the location of a ZPM in ancient Egypt. Hoping that the energy source could be used to power Earth's defenses and open a wormhole to Atlantis, SG-1 uses an ancient time machine to travel back to 3000 B.C.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Moebius (Part 2) : SG-1's attempt to recover a ZPM from 3000 B.C. has altered the timeline, leading to a present where the Stargate was never discovered! The alternate-reality Carter and Jackson convince a reluctant O'Neill to take them on their first mission through.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Avalon (Part 1) : Lieutenant Colonel Cameron Mitchell, the newest member of the SG-1 team, sets out on a mission with Daniel Jackson, Teal'c and Vala to uncover a stash of hidden ancient riches. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.desc: Common Descent : Destiny discovers the survivors of an interplanetary expedition who claim their civilization, Novus, was founded two thousand years earlier by Destiny’s crew. Suddenly, they are attacked by the Drones who have discovered a way to track Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Epilogue : Returning the settlers to their home planet Novus, the Destiny crew discover the planet has been abandoned and is on the verge of seismic destruction. While pouring through an underground archive, the crew learns of the true origins of Novus.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Blockade : When Destiny’s attempt to recharge in a star is foiled by attacking drones, Eli suggests a risky plan to recharge in a super-hot blue giant…a star so hot it could destroy the ship…unless someone stays aboard and keeps the ship under manual control.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Gauntlet : After a battle, Destiny’s only option for survival is a jump to the next galaxy. Crew members return to Earth to say what may be their final farewells before embarking on their journey. But a risky stop may put the entire plan in jeopardy.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: ...Right To Remain Silent : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey's (Tyne Daly) investigation of a deaf teenage fugitive is compromised by their compassion towards her handicap. Meanwhile, David Keeler (guest star Stephen Macht) asks Cagney for forgiveness. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Special Treatment : Detective Lacey's (Tyne Daly) arrest while demonstrating against the transport of nuclear waste through Queens compromises her personal and professional life. Especially when she finds herself in the custody of the Queens' Detective Dupnick.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Happiness Is A Warm Gun : The bloody trail of a stolen handgun ends with near fatal consequences for Detectives Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) when Mary Beth is shot. To help deal with the stress, both women are sent to see the police psychiatrist.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Greed : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) reluctantly go undercover as game show contestants to investigate a crooked television show. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels, Martin Kove as Victor Isbecki, and Carl Lumbly as Mark Petrie.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Secrets : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) turn up evidence of police corruption after an undercover investigation goes awry, and Lacey deals with the arrival of her father in Harvey Jr.'s (Tony La Toree) life. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Don't I Know You? : Cagney (Sharon Gless) falls victim to a date-rape by a respected individual and risks further emotional upset when she decides to file charges against her attacker. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Old Flames : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) investigate the disappearance of two retirement home residents while the Christmas season rekindles feelings of loss in the detectives' personal lives. Also starring Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Trading Places : Harvey, against Lacey's objections, agrees to go undercover to help nab a deadly racketeer who has threatened him, while Cagney battles with the young police academy lieutenant assigned to run the squad in Lt. Samuel's absence.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Shadow Of A Doubt : An Internal Affairs investigation invades the personal lives of Cagney and Lacey after an undercover assignment results in Cagney being tested positive for drugs. Meanwhile, the rest of the squad prepares for Isbecki's bachelor party and wedding.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Hello/Goodbye : The detectives investigate a rash of bogus 911 emergency calls from a Times Square hotel, while Keeler's (guest star Stephen Macht) marriage proposal to Cagney (Sharon Gless) yields a surprising answer. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: School Daze : A refresher course at the police academy provides opportunities that neither Cagney nor Lacey expected. In the meantime, a rash of parking meter rip-offs provide the duo with an opportunity to use their newly acquired interrogation skills.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Land Of The Free : Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) become enmeshed in political intrigue when they investigate an apparent gang-related murder, while Cagney mulls over accepting a date with a man she meets at an A.A. meeting. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: A Class Act : Lacey experiences feelings of inadequacy when she and Cagney mingle with the inner circles of the art world during their investigation of a stolen painting. Meanwhile, Cagney and Nick address the possibility that their relationship may not work.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Button, Button : The AIDS crisis hits close to home forcing Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) to make important decisions in their lives. Meanwhile, the detectives race the clock in their investigation of an apparent suicide. Also starring Al Waxman.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Amends : Cagney faces the dilemma of balancing her personal responsibilities with her career when she eagerly takes control of the Special Crimes Task Force after a member of the 14th Precinct is involved in the shooting death of another officer.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Friendly Smoke : Cagney (Sharon Gless) prepares for the difficult task of facing her rapist in court, possibly without the emotional support of her partner, as Lacey (Tyne Daly) is experiencing profound feelings of guilt upon receiving potentially tragic news.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: Yup : Burglary in an exclusive townhouse leads Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) into a frustrating game with a handful of former employees of a prominent investment banker. Meanwhile, Cagney weaves a tangled web when she lies to Nick.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey
programme.desc: A Fair Shake (Part 1) : Lacey's plans to accompany Harvey to Florida for a contractors' convention are sidetracked when the detectives are tipped to a bank embezzlement. When the investigation widens, Cagney and Lacey are sent to escort a key witness back to the city.

programme.desc: The Ponderosa Birdman : Professor Klump and Amanda pull Hoss into their flying machine scheme. The ""Hoss-mobile""doesn't seem to be destined for a great take-off.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Woman of Fire : Ben's friend, Don Miguel, visits the Ponderosa with his two daughters, Margarita and Elena, and Elena's two very anxious suitors. Their mission? They're on their way to California to meet Margarita's suitor, Don Luis.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Ballerina : Kellie Conrad dances and her father plays the fiddle to earn a living. Hoss feels a sense of guilt after he unintentionally hurts the arm that Kellie's father uses to play the fiddle, in a saloon fight with some roughnecks.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Once a Doctor : Hoss' latest acquaintance, an Englishman named Professor Poppy, is actually Percival Alexander Mundy, M.D., who has given up the practice of medicine. However, when Hoss is shot in the back, only Mundy's skill can save his life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Flannel-Mouth Gun : Adam becomes involved with a quick-triggered range detective hired by the Virginia City Cattleman's Association to find out who is responsible for all the rustling going on in the area.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: The Search : Adam sets out to track down the man who has been impersonating him to clear his reputation.

programme.title: Bonanza

programme.title: Bonanza
